length.label: Length
length.helper: Room or slab length

length.label: Length
length.helper: Length in feet

length.label: Length
length.helper: Length of the concrete slab or structure in meters. Based on ISO 9001 measurement standards.

width.label: Width
width.helper: Width of the concrete element in meters. Typical for industrial floors and foundations.

depth.label: Depth / Thickness
depth.helper: Thickness of the concrete pour in meters. Common range for slabs: 0.1–0.3 m.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Geometric shape of the pour area. Affects volume calculation and waste factors.

wastefactor.label: Waste Factor
wastefactor.helper: Expected material waste due to spillage, over-excavation, or formwork leakage. Lean target < 3%.

compressionstrength.label: Compression Strength Class
compressionstrength.helper: Concrete strength class per EN 206. Higher strength increases cost and reduces volume yield slightly.

reinforcementratio.label: Reinforcement Ratio
reinforcementratio.helper: Steel reinforcement as percentage of concrete volume. Typical range 0.5–3% for structural slabs.

laborrate.label: Labor Rate
laborrate.helper: Hourly labor cost for concrete placement and finishing. Based on regional wage data.

materialcostperm3.label: Material Cost per m³
materialcostperm3.helper: Cost of ready-mix concrete delivered to site. Includes additives if specified.

usepump.label: Use Concrete Pump
usepump.helper: Indicates if a concrete pump is required for placement. Adds cost and reduces waste.

loan_amount.label: Loan Amount
loan_amount.helper: Total principal borrowed, typically 80% of property value.

down_payment_percent.label: Down Payment Percentage
down_payment_percent.helper: Percentage of property price paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.

annual_interest_rate.label: Annual Interest Rate
annual_interest_rate.helper: Nominal annual rate, fixed or variable. Used for monthly compounding.

loan_term_years.label: Loan Term (Years)
loan_term_years.helper: Duration of the mortgage in years. Standard terms: 15, 20, 30.

property_tax_rate.label: Property Tax Rate
property_tax_rate.helper: Annual property tax as percentage of property value. Varies by jurisdiction.

insurance_rate.label: Home Insurance Rate
insurance_rate.helper: Annual homeowner's insurance as percentage of property value.

monthly_hoa.label: Monthly HOA Fee
monthly_hoa.helper: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.

annual_income.label: Annual Gross Income
annual_income.helper: Total annual household income before taxes. Used for DTI calculation.

monthly_debt.label: Monthly Existing Debt Payments
monthly_debt.helper: Recurring monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, credit cards).

payment_frequency.label: Payment Frequency
payment_frequency.helper: How often payments are made. Accelerated biweekly results in 13 full payments per year.

principal.label: Principal Amount
principal.helper: Initial investment or loan amount in base currency.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Rate
annualinterestrate.helper: Nominal annual interest rate as a percentage.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., 1=annual, 12=monthly, 365=daily).

timeperiod.label: Time Period
timeperiod.helper: Total duration of investment or loan in years.

additionalcontribution.label: Additional Contribution per Period
additionalcontribution.helper: Fixed amount added at the end of each compounding period.

inflationrate.label: Inflation Rate
inflationrate.helper: Expected annual inflation rate for real value adjustment.

taxrate.label: Tax Rate on Interest
taxrate.helper: Percentage of interest earnings taxed annually.

list_price.label: List Price (per unit)
list_price.helper: Standard selling price before any discount, as defined in ISO 9001 cost accounting procedures.

discount_percent.label: Discount Percentage
discount_percent.helper: Negotiated or promotional discount off list price, typical in Lean pricing strategies.

quantity.label: Order Quantity
quantity.helper: Number of units in the transaction, used for volume-based discount analysis per WERC DC metrics.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable Cost per Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct material, labor, and variable overhead per unit (ISO 14051 MFCA standard).

fixed_cost_allocation.label: Fixed Cost Allocation (total)
fixed_cost_allocation.helper: Allocated fixed costs for the order batch (e.g., setup, engineering, admin) per Lean cost deployment.

discount_type.label: Discount Type
discount_type.helper: Method of discount application: percentage off list or fixed dollar amount per unit.

apply_to_all_units.label: Apply Discount to All Units
apply_to_all_units.placeholder: Enter apply discount to all units
apply_to_all_units.helper: If true, discount applies to entire quantity; if false, only to incremental units (tiered pricing).

total_units.label: Total Units Produced
total_units.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting period (ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Number of units failing quality inspection (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that required rework to meet specifications (Lean waste reduction).

scrap_units.label: Scrap Units
scrap_units.helper: Units that are scrapped and cannot be reworked (material yield loss).

target_yield.label: Target Yield (%)
target_yield.helper: Desired first-pass yield percentage (Six Sigma target ≥ 99.99966% for 6σ).

process_type.label: Process Type
process_type.helper: Type of process for contextual benchmarking (WERC DC metrics, ISO 9001).

include_scrap_in_defect.label: Include Scrap in Defect Count
include_scrap_in_defect.placeholder: Enter include scrap in defect count
include_scrap_in_defect.helper: If true, scrap units are counted as defective for defect rate calculation.

fixed_costs.label: Total Fixed Costs (per period)
fixed_costs.helper: Sum of all fixed costs (rent, salaries, insurance, depreciation) for the period. ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.4.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable Cost per Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct material, direct labor, and variable overhead per unit. Lean manufacturing standard cost approach.

selling_price_per_unit.label: Selling Price per Unit
selling_price_per_unit.helper: Net selling price after discounts and returns. WERC DC Metrics benchmark.

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts per million defective. Six Sigma DMAIC metric. Typical baseline 5000 ppm (3.8 sigma).

rework_cost_per_unit.label: Rework Cost per Defective Unit
rework_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Enter rework cost per defective unit
rework_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost to rework or scrap a defective unit. Includes labor, material, and overhead.

production_volume.label: Actual Production Volume (units)
production_volume.helper: Total units produced in the period. Used for actual vs. break-even comparison.

cost_allocation_method.label: Cost Allocation Method
cost_allocation_method.helper: Traditional uses single overhead rate; activity-based uses multiple cost drivers. ABC is recommended for ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3.

annual_revenue.label: Annual Revenue (USD)
annual_revenue.helper: Total annual revenue of the facility or business unit.

operating_margin.label: Operating Margin (%)
operating_margin.helper: Current operating profit margin as a percentage of revenue.

total_inventory_value.label: Total Inventory Value (USD)
total_inventory_value.helper: Current value of all inventory held (raw materials, WIP, finished goods).

inventory_carrying_cost_percent.label: Inventory Carrying Cost (% of inventory value)
inventory_carrying_cost_percent.placeholder: Enter inventory carrying cost (% of inventory value)
inventory_carrying_cost_percent.helper: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, obsolescence, capital cost). Typical range 20-30%.

annual_labor_cost.label: Annual Direct Labor Cost (USD)
annual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual cost of direct labor in the operation.

defect_rate_percent.label: Defect Rate (%)
defect_rate_percent.helper: Percentage of products that do not meet quality standards (Six Sigma metric).

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per Defect (USD)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost incurred per defective unit (rework, scrap, warranty).

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Energy Cost (USD)
annual_energy_cost.helper: Total annual energy expenditure for the facility.

lean_implementation_cost.label: Lean Implementation Cost (USD)
lean_implementation_cost.helper: One-time cost for implementing Lean/Six Sigma improvements (training, tools, consulting).

expected_improvement_factor.label: Expected Improvement Factor (0-1)
expected_improvement_factor.helper: Expected fractional improvement from Lean initiatives (e.g., 0.15 = 15% reduction in waste).

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Type of industrial operation for benchmarking and standard adjustments.

iso_certified.label: ISO 9001 Certified
iso_certified.helper: Indicates if the facility is ISO 9001 certified, affecting quality cost baselines.

direct_labor_hours.label: Direct Labor Hours per Unit
direct_labor_hours.placeholder: Enter direct labor hours per unit
direct_labor_hours.helper: Standard time per unit from time studies (ISO 9001 clause 7.1.4).

hourly_wage.label: Average Hourly Wage
hourly_wage.helper: Weighted average of direct labor wages including shift differentials.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Rate
overhead_rate.helper: Includes facility, utilities, indirect labor, and depreciation (WERC DC Measures).

tooling_cost_per_unit.label: Tooling Cost per Unit
tooling_cost_per_unit.helper: Amortized cost of jigs, fixtures, and perishable tools (Lean TPM).

quality_cost_per_unit.label: Quality Cost per Unit
quality_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost of inspection, rework, scrap, and warranty (Six Sigma COPQ).

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.helper: Number of units produced per setup (Lean SMED).

setup_time_hours.label: Setup Time per Batch
setup_time_hours.helper: Time to change over equipment between batches (Lean SMED).

profit_margin.label: Target Profit Margin
profit_margin.helper: Desired markup over total cost (strategic pricing).

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: ISO 4217 currency code for financial reporting.

include_setup.label: Include Setup Cost in Rate
include_setup.placeholder: Enter include setup cost in rate
include_setup.helper: If true, setup time is amortized across batch size.

avg_days_receivable.label: Average Days Receivable (DSO)
avg_days_receivable.helper: Average number of days to collect payment after a sale. High DSO indicates potential cash flow issues.

avg_days_payable.label: Average Days Payable (DPO)
avg_days_payable.helper: Average number of days to pay suppliers. Higher DPO can improve cash flow but may strain supplier relationships.

inventory_days.label: Inventory Days (DII)
inventory_days.helper: Average number of days inventory is held before sale. High DII ties up cash and increases holding costs.

operating_expenses_daily.label: Daily Operating Expenses
operating_expenses_daily.helper: Total daily operating costs including labor, materials, overhead. Used to compute cash gap in monetary terms.

revenue_daily.label: Daily Revenue
revenue_daily.helper: Average daily revenue from sales. Used to compute cash conversion cycle and gap.

payment_terms_suppliers.label: Supplier Payment Terms
payment_terms_suppliers.helper: Standard payment terms offered by suppliers. Affects DPO and cash gap.

customer_payment_behavior.label: Customer Payment Behavior
customer_payment_behavior.helper: Historical customer payment behavior. Adjusts effective DSO.

lean_inventory_flag.label: Lean Inventory Practices Active
lean_inventory_flag.helper: Indicates if Lean inventory methods (e.g., JIT) are in place to reduce inventory days.

six_sigma_quality_level.label: Six Sigma Quality Level (Sigma)
six_sigma_quality_level.helper: Current process sigma level. Higher sigma indicates fewer defects and less cash tied up in rework/scrap.

cutting_length.label: Cutting Length
cutting_length.helper: Total length of the tool path in contact with the workpiece. Derived from CAM or drawing.

feed_rate.label: Feed Rate
feed_rate.helper: Linear feed speed of the cutting tool. Based on material and tool specifications.

spindle_speed.label: Spindle Speed
spindle_speed.helper: Rotational speed of the spindle. Affects cutting speed and surface finish.

number_of_passes.label: Number of Passes
number_of_passes.helper: Number of cutting passes required to achieve final geometry.

rapid_traverse_distance.label: Rapid Traverse Distance
rapid_traverse_distance.helper: Total distance traveled at rapid traverse (non-cutting moves).

rapid_traverse_rate.label: Rapid Traverse Rate
rapid_traverse_rate.helper: Maximum speed of the machine during rapid moves.

tool_change_time.label: Tool Change Time
tool_change_time.helper: Average time to change a tool, including turret indexing.

number_of_tool_changes.label: Number of Tool Changes
number_of_tool_changes.helper: Total tool changes required for the operation.

material_hardness_factor.label: Material Hardness Factor
material_hardness_factor.helper: Adjusts cutting time based on material machinability. Refer to ISO 3685.

tool_wear_factor.label: Tool Wear Factor
tool_wear_factor.helper: Multiplier for tool wear. 1.0 = new tool, >1.0 = worn tool. Based on tool life data.

machine_efficiency.label: Machine Efficiency
machine_efficiency.helper: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) factor. Accounts for downtime, speed loss, and quality loss.

part_loading_time.label: Part Loading/Unloading Time
part_loading_time.helper: Time to load and unload the workpiece from the machine.

coolant_on_time.label: Coolant On Time
coolant_on_time.helper: Time for coolant to activate and stabilize before cutting.

measurement_time.label: In-Process Measurement Time
measurement_time.helper: Time for probing or manual measurement during the cycle.

energy_consumption_kwh.label: Energy Consumption (kWh)
energy_consumption_kwh.helper: Total metered kilowatt-hours for the billing period. Used as primary driver for energy cost.

peak_demand_kw.label: Peak Demand (kW)
peak_demand_kw.helper: Highest 15-minute average demand in the period. Drives demand charges per utility tariff.

energy_rate_per_kwh.label: Energy Rate ($/kWh)
energy_rate_per_kwh.helper: Blended energy charge from utility bill, including generation and transmission.

demand_rate_per_kw.label: Demand Rate ($/kW)
demand_rate_per_kw.helper: Monthly demand charge per kW of peak demand, varies by utility and region.

power_factor.label: Power Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real power to apparent power. Low PF incurs penalties per utility tariff.

pf_penalty_threshold.label: PF Penalty Threshold
pf_penalty_threshold.helper: Minimum power factor before penalty applies, typically 0.9 per utility standards.

pf_penalty_rate.label: PF Penalty Rate ($/kvar)
pf_penalty_rate.helper: Cost per reactive power (kvar) when PF below threshold.

system_efficiency.label: System Efficiency (%)
system_efficiency.helper: Overall electrical system efficiency including transformers, cables, and motors. Used for loss adjustment.

operating_hours.label: Operating Hours per Month
operating_hours.helper: Total hours the facility operates in the billing period. Used for load factor calculation.

tariff_type.label: Tariff Type
tariff_type.helper: Utility rate structure. Affects how energy and demand charges are calculated.

include_demand_charge.label: Include Demand Charge
include_demand_charge.helper: Toggle to include or exclude demand charges from total cost.

compressor_power_rating.label: Compressor Motor Power Rating
compressor_power_rating.helper: Nameplate power of the compressor motor. Typically from 5 kW to 5000 kW for industrial units.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency of the electric motor driving the compressor. Premium efficiency motors (IE3/IE4) are >90%.

compressor_type.label: Compressor Type
compressor_type.helper: Different compressor types have different specific power curves and maintenance profiles.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Operating Hours per Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total annual operating hours. Typical industrial: 8000 hours (2 shifts, 5 days).

load_factor.label: Load Factor (Average % of Full Load)
load_factor.placeholder: Enter load factor (average % of full load)
load_factor.helper: Average percentage of full load capacity at which the compressor operates. Includes part-load and unloaded periods.

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity Cost
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Blended average cost per kWh including demand charges. Typical range $0.05-$0.30.

leakage_percentage.label: Estimated System Leakage
leakage_percentage.helper: Percentage of compressed air lost through leaks. Typical industrial systems: 20-30%.

pressure_setpoint.label: System Pressure Setpoint
pressure_setpoint.helper: Operating pressure at the compressor discharge. Higher pressure increases energy consumption by ~1% per 0.1 bar.

ambient_temperature.label: Average Ambient Temperature
ambient_temperature.helper: Average ambient temperature at compressor intake. Higher temperature reduces air density and increases power.

has_vsd.label: Variable Speed Drive (VSD) Installed
has_vsd.helper: VSD can reduce energy consumption by 15-35% under part-load conditions.

maintenance_quality.label: Maintenance Quality Level
maintenance_quality.helper: Maintenance quality affects efficiency, leakage, and pressure drop. Poor maintenance can increase energy use by 10-20%.

length_cm.label: Length (cm)
length_cm.helper: Physical length of the package in centimeters. ISO 1:2016 standard for geometric product specifications.

width_cm.label: Width (cm)
width_cm.helper: Physical width of the package in centimeters.

height_cm.label: Height (cm)
height_cm.helper: Physical height of the package in centimeters.

actual_weight_kg.label: Actual Weight (kg)
actual_weight_kg.helper: Gross weight of the package including packaging. Per ISO 80000-4:2006.

carrier_factor.label: Carrier DIM Factor
carrier_factor.helper: Volumetric divisor used by carrier (e.g., FedEx/UPS: 5000, DHL: 5000, Air freight: 6000). WERC standard.

package_type.label: Package Type
package_type.helper: Type of packaging influences dimensional stability and handling. Lean packaging standard.

is_stackable.label: Stackable
is_stackable.helper: Indicates if package can be stacked. Affects storage density and handling cost. Six Sigma material flow optimization.

hazardous_material.label: Hazardous Material
hazardous_material.helper: Indicates if contents are hazardous (IMO/ADR/IATA). Affects surcharges and handling restrictions.

distance_km.label: Route Distance (km)
distance_km.helper: Total one-way distance of the route. Used as primary driver for fuel, labor, and maintenance costs.

fuel_consumption_l_per_100km.label: Fuel Consumption (L/100km)
fuel_consumption_l_per_100km.helper: Average fuel consumption of the vehicle. Based on manufacturer data or telematics.

fuel_price_per_l.label: Fuel Price (per liter)
fuel_price_per_l.helper: Current market price of diesel or gasoline. Updated weekly.

driver_wage_per_hour.label: Driver Wage (€/hour)
driver_wage_per_hour.helper: Gross hourly wage including social charges. Based on collective labor agreements.

average_speed_kmh.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmh.helper: Expected average speed including traffic and stops. Used to calculate travel time.

maintenance_cost_per_km.label: Maintenance Cost (€/km)
maintenance_cost_per_km.helper: Average maintenance cost per kilometer including tires, oil, and repairs. Based on fleet data.

toll_cost_total.label: Total Toll Cost (€)
toll_cost_total.helper: Sum of all tolls on the route. Can be obtained from route planning software.

load_weight_tonnes.label: Load Weight (tonnes)
load_weight_tonnes.helper: Total weight of cargo. Affects fuel consumption and wear.

route_type.label: Route Type
route_type.helper: Characterizes the terrain and traffic conditions. Influences fuel consumption and speed.

is_return_trip.label: Return Trip Included
is_return_trip.helper: If true, distance and costs are doubled (round trip).

distance_km.label: Distance (km)
distance_km.helper: Total route distance from origin to destination, used for fuel and time cost calculations.

fuel_cost_per_liter.label: Fuel Cost per Liter
fuel_cost_per_liter.helper: Current average fuel price per liter, directly impacts variable transport cost.

fuel_efficiency_kmpl.label: Fuel Efficiency (km/L)
fuel_efficiency_kmpl.helper: Vehicle fuel consumption rate in kilometers per liter, key for fuel cost estimation.

driver_wage_per_hour.label: Driver Wage per Hour
driver_wage_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage of the driver, including benefits and overtime provisions.

average_speed_kmph.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmph.helper: Expected average travel speed including traffic and stops, used to compute travel time.

load_weight_kg.label: Load Weight (kg)
load_weight_kg.helper: Total weight of cargo, affects fuel consumption and handling costs.

handling_cost_per_kg.label: Handling Cost per kg
handling_cost_per_kg.helper: Cost for loading/unloading and warehouse handling per kilogram of cargo.

vehicle_maintenance_per_km.label: Vehicle Maintenance per km
vehicle_maintenance_per_km.helper: Average maintenance cost per kilometer, including tires, oil, and repairs.

toll_cost.label: Toll Cost
toll_cost.helper: Total toll charges along the route, if applicable.

insurance_rate_per_kg.label: Insurance Rate per kg
insurance_rate_per_kg.helper: Insurance premium per kilogram of cargo value, covering risk during transit.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead Percentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Indirect costs (administration, IT, facilities) as a percentage of direct costs.

is_express_delivery.label: Express Delivery
is_express_delivery.helper: If true, applies a premium multiplier to reflect expedited service costs.

delivery_zone.label: Delivery Zone
delivery_zone.helper: Geographic zone classification affecting last-mile complexity and cost multipliers.

shipment_weight_kg.label: Shipment Weight (kg)
shipment_weight_kg.helper: Total weight of the shipment, including packaging. Used for rate base and dimensional weight calculations.

shipment_volume_cbm.label: Shipment Volume (cbm)
shipment_volume_cbm.helper: Total cubic meters of the shipment. Used for dimensional weight factor and space utilization analysis.

distance_km.label: Distance (km)
distance_km.helper: Total transport distance from origin to destination. Influences fuel surcharge and time-based costs.

transport_mode.label: Transport Mode
transport_mode.helper: Mode of transport. Each mode has distinct cost structures, risk profiles, and carbon impact.

fuel_surcharge_percent.label: Fuel Surcharge (%)
fuel_surcharge_percent.helper: Percentage applied to base freight rate to account for fuel price variability. Typically indexed to DOE or IATA.

accessorial_charges_usd.label: Accessorial Charges (USD)
accessorial_charges_usd.helper: Additional fees for liftgate, residential delivery, inside delivery, detention, etc.

density_factor.label: Density Factor (kg/cbm)
density_factor.helper: Actual density of the shipment. Used to compare against breakpoints for LTL class or airfreight chargeable weight.

is_hazardous.label: Hazardous Material
is_hazardous.helper: Indicates if shipment contains dangerous goods. Triggers additional compliance and handling fees.

is_expedited.label: Expedited Service
is_expedited.helper: If true, applies a premium multiplier for time-definite delivery.

purchase_price.label: Purchase Price (USD)
purchase_price.helper: Initial acquisition cost of the vehicle, including taxes and fees.

residual_value.label: Residual Value (USD)
residual_value.helper: Estimated market value of the vehicle at the end of the holding period.

holding_period_years.label: Holding Period (Years)
holding_period_years.helper: Expected number of years the vehicle will be owned and used.

annual_mileage.label: Annual Mileage (miles)
annual_mileage.helper: Average miles driven per year, directly impacts wear and depreciation.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Accounting method used to allocate depreciation expense over the holding period.

maintenance_cost_per_year.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (USD)
maintenance_cost_per_year.helper: Average yearly expenditure on repairs, tires, and routine servicing.

fuel_efficiency_mpg.label: Fuel Efficiency (MPG)
fuel_efficiency_mpg.helper: Miles per gallon, used to estimate fuel cost and total cost of ownership.

fuel_price_per_gallon.label: Fuel Price per Gallon (USD)
fuel_price_per_gallon.helper: Current or projected average fuel price for the vehicle's fuel type.

insurance_cost_per_year.label: Annual Insurance Cost (USD)
insurance_cost_per_year.helper: Yearly premium for comprehensive and liability coverage.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (%)
discount_rate.helper: Annual discount rate used for net present value calculations (cost of capital).

vehicle_type.label: Vehicle Type
vehicle_type.helper: Category of vehicle, influences depreciation curves and maintenance patterns.

crop_type.label: Crop Type
crop_type.helper: Determines the nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P), and potassium (K) uptake coefficients from agronomic tables.

target_yield.label: Target Yield
target_yield.helper: Expected harvest per hectare, used to calculate total nutrient demand.

soil_nitrogen.label: Soil Nitrogen (N) Content
soil_nitrogen.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of N fertilizer needed.

soil_phosphorus.label: Soil Phosphorus (P) Content
soil_phosphorus.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of P fertilizer needed.

soil_potassium.label: Soil Potassium (K) Content
soil_potassium.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of K fertilizer needed.

application_efficiency.label: Application Efficiency Factor
application_efficiency.helper: Percentage of applied fertilizer that is actually taken up by the crop; affected by method, timing, and weather.

fertilizer_type_n.label: Nitrogen Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_n.helper: Different sources have different N concentration and loss characteristics.

fertilizer_type_p.label: Phosphorus Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_p.helper: Different sources have different P concentration and solubility.

fertilizer_type_k.label: Potassium Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_k.helper: Different sources have different K concentration and salt index.

soil_moisture.label: Soil Moisture Content
soil_moisture.helper: Affects nutrient availability and leaching risk; used in loss adjustment.

rainfall_forecast.label: Rainfall Forecast (next 7 days)
rainfall_forecast.helper: Expected precipitation; high rainfall increases N loss via leaching and denitrification.

organic_matter.label: Soil Organic Matter
organic_matter.helper: Contributes to nutrient supply; higher OM reduces fertilizer requirement.

target_population.label: Target Plant Population (plants/ha)
target_population.helper: Desired final stand count per hectare based on agronomic recommendations and yield goals.

germination_rate.label: Germination Rate (%)
germination_rate.helper: Percentage of seeds expected to germinate under optimal conditions, typically from seed lot analysis.

field_emergence_factor.label: Field Emergence Factor (%)
field_emergence_factor.helper: Expected percentage of germinated seeds that emerge as healthy seedlings, accounting for soil conditions, pests, and weather.

seed_weight.label: Seed Weight (g per 1000 seeds)
seed_weight.helper: Thousand kernel weight (TKW) from seed supplier or lab test, used to convert seed count to mass.

row_spacing.label: Row Spacing (cm)
row_spacing.helper: Distance between planting rows, typically set by planter configuration and crop type.

planter_efficiency.label: Planter Efficiency (%)
planter_efficiency.helper: Operational efficiency of the planter accounting for skips, doubles, and mechanical losses (Lean OEE metric).

seed_cost_per_unit.label: Seed Cost per Unit ($/kg)
seed_cost_per_unit.helper: Purchase price of seed per kilogram, used for economic analysis.

expected_yield_value.label: Expected Yield Value ($/tonne)
expected_yield_value.helper: Market price per tonne of harvested crop, used for ROI calculations.

soil_type.label: Soil Type
soil_type.helper: Soil texture classification affecting emergence factor and recommended seeding depth.

irrigation_available.label: Irrigation Available
irrigation_available.helper: Indicates if supplemental irrigation is used, influencing emergence and target population.

water_volume.label: Annual water volume used
water_volume.helper: Total volume of water withdrawn for irrigation per year.

water_cost_per_m3.label: Water cost per m³
water_cost_per_m3.helper: Unit cost of water including extraction, treatment, and delivery.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: Energy cost per kWh
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average electricity cost for pumping and distribution.

pump_efficiency.label: Pump system efficiency
pump_efficiency.helper: Overall efficiency of pump and motor system (ISO 9906).

distribution_losses.label: Distribution losses
distribution_losses.helper: Percentage of water lost due to leaks, evaporation, and runoff.

labor_hours_per_year.label: Annual labor hours for irrigation
labor_hours_per_year.placeholder: Enter annual labor hours for irrigation
labor_hours_per_year.helper: Total labor hours dedicated to irrigation operation and maintenance.

labor_rate.label: Labor rate per hour
labor_rate.helper: Average hourly wage including benefits.

maintenance_cost.label: Annual maintenance cost
maintenance_cost.helper: Total annual cost for repairs, parts, and servicing.

crop_value_per_ha.label: Crop value per hectare
crop_value_per_ha.helper: Average revenue generated per hectare from irrigated crops.

system_type.label: Irrigation system type
system_type.helper: Type of irrigation system affecting efficiency and cost structure.

water_source.label: Water source

has_automation.label: Automation system installed

feed_intake_kg.label: Daily feed intake per animal (kg)

feed_intake_kg.helper: Average daily feed consumption per animal, based on species and growth stage.

raw_material_cost_per_kg.label: Raw material cost per kg
raw_material_cost_per_kg.placeholder: Enter raw material cost per kg
raw_material_cost_per_kg.helper: Cost of primary feed ingredients (corn, soybean meal, etc.) per kilogram.

processing_loss_percent.label: Processing loss (%)
processing_loss_percent.helper: Percentage of raw material lost during milling, mixing, pelleting, or storage.

moisture_adjustment_factor.label: Moisture adjustment factor
moisture_adjustment_factor.helper: Correction factor for moisture content variation in raw materials (1.0 = standard).

quality_grade.label: Quality grade

material_cost_per_kg.label: Material Cost per kg
material_cost_per_kg.helper: Direct material cost per kilogram of the primary ingredient, sourced from supplier contracts or market index.

recipe_yield_percent.label: Recipe Yield (%)
recipe_yield_percent.helper: Percentage of usable output after processing losses (e.g., evaporation, trimming). Based on historical process data.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Rate per Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Fully burdened labor cost per operator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead.

batch_size_kg.label: Batch Size (kg)
batch_size_kg.helper: Total input weight of the recipe batch before processing.

processing_time_minutes.label: Processing Time (minutes)
processing_time_minutes.helper: Total cycle time from start to finish for one batch, including mixing, heating, cooling, and packaging.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: Energy Cost per kWh
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average cost of electricity or thermal energy per kilowatt-hour, based on utility rates.

energy_consumption_kwh.label: Energy Consumption (kWh)
energy_consumption_kwh.helper: Total energy used per batch, measured by submeters or equipment nameplate ratings.

overhead_rate_percent.label: Overhead Rate (%)
overhead_rate_percent.helper: Allocated manufacturing overhead as a percentage of direct labor and material costs, following standard cost accounting.

waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Waste Disposal Cost per kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.placeholder: Enter waste disposal cost per kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: Cost to dispose of non-recyclable waste per kilogram, including landfill fees or incineration.

quality_rework_rate.label: Quality Rework Rate (%)
quality_rework_rate.helper: Percentage of batches requiring rework due to quality deviations, tracked via Six Sigma metrics.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: ISO 4217 currency code for cost reporting. All input costs are assumed in this currency.

include_environmental_cost.label: Include Environmental Cost
include_environmental_cost.helper: Toggle to include estimated carbon tax or environmental compliance costs in the total cost.

raw_material_cost_per_unit.label: Raw Material Cost per Unit
raw_material_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Enter raw material cost per unit
raw_material_cost_per_unit.helper: Purchase price of the primary ingredient per kilogram, sourced from supplier invoice or ERP.

portion_weight.label: Portion Weight
portion_weight.helper: Target weight of one finished portion as specified in the recipe or product spec.

yield_percentage.label: Yield Percentage
yield_percentage.helper: Usable output after processing (trimming, cooking, etc.). Measured via Six Sigma process capability studies.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Fully burdened labor rate including wages, benefits, and payroll taxes.

labor_hours_per_batch.label: Labor Hours per Batch
labor_hours_per_batch.helper: Direct labor time to produce one batch of the product.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.helper: Number of portions produced per batch.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Rate
overhead_rate.helper: Allocated overhead (utilities, rent, equipment depreciation) as a percentage of direct material and labor costs. Based on WERC cost-to-serve model.

waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Waste Disposal Cost per kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.placeholder: Enter waste disposal cost per kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: Cost to dispose of trimmings and waste, including hauling and landfill fees.

trim_loss_percentage.label: Trim Loss Percentage
trim_loss_percentage.helper: Percentage of raw material lost during trimming or preparation.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: Currency for all monetary inputs and outputs.

comparisonyears.label: Comparison years
comparisonyears.helper: Number of years to compare (e.g. 10 or 20)

downpaymentpercent.label: Down payment
downpaymentpercent.helper: Percent of home price paid upfront

investmentreturnrate.label: Investment return
investmentreturnrate.helper: Annual return if renting and investing cash

ownershipcostpercent.label: Ownership cost
ownershipcostpercent.helper: Annual ownership cost as % of home value

bill_amount.label: Bill Amount
bill_amount.helper: Total pre-tax bill amount for the service transaction.

service_quality.label: Service Quality Rating

party_size.label: Party Size

include_tax_in_tip.placeholder: Enter include tax in tip calculation
include_tax_in_tip.helper: If true, tip is calculated on bill amount including tax; otherwise on pre-tax amount.

round_up.placeholder: Enter round up tip to nearest dollar
round_up.helper: If true, the final tip amount is rounded up to the next whole dollar.

data_points.label: Data Points (comma or space separated)
data_points.placeholder: Enter data points (comma or space separated)
data_points.helper: Raw measurements from process output, e.g., dimensions, weights, cycle times.

sample_size.label: Sample Size (n)
sample_size.helper: Number of observations in the sample. Must be at least 2 for standard deviation calculation.

data_type.label: Data Type
data_type.helper: Continuous data (e.g., length, time) vs discrete (e.g., count of defects). Affects interpretation.

population_flag.label: Population or Sample?

unit_of_measure.label: Unit of Measure
unit_of_measure.helper: Physical unit of the data points (e.g., mm, sec, kg). Used for output labeling.

specification_limit_lower.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
specification_limit_lower.helper: Lower bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.

specification_limit_upper.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
specification_limit_upper.helper: Upper bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.

target_value.label: Target Value (Nominal)
target_value.helper: Ideal process target, often the midpoint of specification limits.

defect_count.label: Number of Defects
defect_count.helper: Total observed defects in the sample or process period.

sample_size.label: Sample Size
sample_size.helper: Total number of units inspected or trials performed.

sigma_shift.label: Sigma Shift (1.5 for long-term)
sigma_shift.helper: Standard shift to convert short-term capability to long-term (commonly 1.5).

distribution_type.label: Distribution Type
distribution_type.helper: Underlying statistical distribution for probability calculation.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Desired confidence level for interval estimates.

use_historical_bias.label: Apply Historical Bias Correction
use_historical_bias.helper: If true, applies a correction factor based on past process performance.

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level
confidencelevel.helper: Standard confidence levels per ISO 2859-1 and Six Sigma DMAIC.

marginoferror.label: Margin of Error (Precision)
marginoferror.helper: Acceptable deviation from true population parameter; typical for process audits.

populationsize.label: Population Size (Lot Size)
populationsize.helper: Total items in the lot or process output per period.

expectedproportion.label: Expected Proportion (Defect Rate)
expectedproportion.helper: Historical or assumed defect rate; used in attribute sampling.

standarddeviation.label: Standard Deviation (Process Sigma)
standarddeviation.helper: Estimated process variation for variables sampling (e.g., SPC).

effectsize.label: Effect Size (Minimum Detectable Difference)
effectsize.helper: Smallest practical change to detect in hypothesis testing (Six Sigma).

samplingmethod.label: Sampling Method
samplingmethod.helper: Design effect adjustment per WERC and ISO 2859 guidelines.

usefinitecorrection.label: Apply Finite Population Correction
usefinitecorrection.helper: When sample > 5% of population, correction reduces sample size.

data_points.label: Data Points (comma-separated)
data_points.helper: Raw sample measurements from the process. At least 2 values required for calculation.

population_mean.label: Population Mean (μ)
population_mean.helper: Target or historical mean of the process. If unknown, leave blank to use sample mean.

population_stddev.label: Population Standard Deviation (σ)
population_stddev.helper: Known process standard deviation. If unknown, leave blank to use sample standard deviation.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Desired confidence level for interval estimation. Common values: 90%, 95%, 99%.

tail_type.label: Tail Type
tail_type.helper: Specifies whether the test is one-tailed (upper/lower) or two-tailed.

use_sample_std.label: Use Sample Standard Deviation (if σ unknown)
use_sample_std.placeholder: Enter use sample standard deviation (if σ unknown)
use_sample_std.helper: When true, the calculator will estimate σ from the sample data using Bessel's correction.

total_employees.label: Total Employees
total_employees.helper: Total number of full-time equivalent employees in the organization.

absenteeism_rate.label: Absenteeism Rate (%)
absenteeism_rate.helper: Percentage of scheduled work hours lost due to unplanned absences (ISO 30400).

avg_hourly_wage.label: Average Hourly Wage (USD)
avg_hourly_wage.helper: Weighted average hourly wage including benefits and payroll taxes.

avg_hours_per_day.label: Average Hours per Day
avg_hours_per_day.helper: Standard scheduled hours per employee per day.

working_days_per_year.label: Working Days per Year
working_days_per_year.helper: Number of scheduled working days per year (excluding weekends and holidays).

replacement_cost_per_hour.label: Replacement Cost per Hour (USD)
replacement_cost_per_hour.helper: Average cost of overtime, temporary staff, or cross-training to cover absent employees.

overhead_multiplier.label: Overhead Multiplier
overhead_multiplier.helper: Multiplier to account for indirect costs (supervision, facilities, HR) per direct labor hour.

model_type.label: AI Model Type

input_tokens_per_month.label: Input Tokens per Month
input_tokens_per_month.helper: Total number of tokens sent to the model as input (prompt) over a month.

output_tokens_per_month.label: Output Tokens per Month
output_tokens_per_month.helper: Total number of tokens generated by the model as output (completion) over a month.

batch_size.label: Average Batch Size
batch_size.helper: Number of requests processed together in a single batch to optimize throughput.

compute_hours_per_month.label: Compute Hours per Month
compute_hours_per_month.helper: Total hours of GPU/TPU compute time allocated for inference per month.

gpu_hourly_cost.label: GPU Hourly Cost
gpu_hourly_cost.helper: Hourly cost of the GPU instance used for inference (e.g., A100, H100).

overhead_factor.label: Overhead Factor
overhead_factor.helper: Percentage overhead for data transfer, API latency, and retries (Lean waste reduction).

enable_data_confidence.label: Enable Data Confidence Adjustment
enable_data_confidence.helper: If enabled, applies a confidence factor based on input data quality (Six Sigma DMAIC).

nominal_rate.label: Nominal Annual Interest Rate
nominal_rate.helper: The stated annual interest rate before compounding, as per ISO 8000-1 financial data standards.

compounding_frequency.label: Compounding Frequency

time_period_years.label: Investment Period

initial_principal.label: Initial Principal

fee_percentage.label: Management Fee

inflation_rate.label: Expected Inflation Rate

tax_rate.label: Tax Rate on Gains
tax_rate.helper: Capital gains tax rate applied to nominal returns, aligned with ISO 14000 environmental cost accounting.

is_continuous_compounding.label: Continuous Compounding

lot_size.label: Lot Size (N)

sampling_plan_type.label: Sampling Plan Type

unit_cost.label: Unit Cost

defect_cost_per_unit.label: Defect Cost per Unit

inspection_cost_per_unit.label: Inspection Cost per Unit
inspection_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost to inspect one unit (labor, equipment, overhead).

defect_rate_actual.label: Actual Defect Rate (p)

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level for risk calculations.

down_payment.label: Down Payment

existing_monthly_debt.helper: Sum of all other monthly debt obligations (credit cards, student loans, etc.).

insurance_cost_monthly.label: Monthly Insurance Premium

registration_fee_annual.label: Annual Registration Fee

avg_labor_rate.label: Average Labor Rate

parts_cost.label: Parts Cost (USD)

labor_hours.label: Labor Hours
labor_hours.helper: Estimated technician hours based on standard repair times (e.g., Mitchell, ALLDATA).

labor_rate.helper: Standard hourly labor charge from the repair shop.

labor_hours.helper: Total labor hours quoted for the repair job.

parts_cost.label: Parts Cost

tax_rate.helper: Applicable sales tax percentage on parts and supplies.

use_original_parts.label: Use Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) Parts

gender.label: Gender

age.label: Age

height.label: Height

friction_coefficient_thread.label: Friction Coefficient (Thread)
friction_coefficient_thread.helper: µ_th: affects torque-preload relationship. Typical range 0.08-0.20 for lubricated steel.

friction_coefficient_head.label: Friction Coefficient (Head/Nut face)
friction_coefficient_head.helper: µ_h: underhead or nut face friction. Higher values reduce preload efficiency.

preload_percentage.label: Target Preload (% of Yield)
preload_percentage.helper: Typical assembly preload target. ISO 898 recommends 70-80% for static joints.

lubrication_condition.label: Lubrication Condition
lubrication_condition.helper: Affects friction coefficients and torque scatter.

temperature.label: Operating Temperature
temperature.helper: High temperature reduces yield strength and alters friction.

use_washers.label: Use Washers (Under Head & Nut)
use_washers.helper: Washers reduce embedment and distribute load.

bottleneck_utilization.label: Bottleneck Utilization (%)
bottleneck_utilization.helper: Current utilization rate of the primary bottleneck resource, measured over a representative period (e.g., last 4 weeks).

demand_rate.label: Average Demand Rate (units/hour)
demand_rate.helper: Average customer demand rate for the product family flowing through the bottleneck.

bottleneck_capacity.label: Bottleneck Capacity (units/hour)
bottleneck_capacity.helper: Maximum theoretical output rate of the bottleneck resource under ideal conditions.

investment_cost.label: Proposed Investment Cost ($)
investment_cost.helper: Total capital expenditure required for the bottleneck improvement (e.g., new equipment, tooling, automation).

expected_capacity_increase.label: Expected Capacity Increase (%)
expected_capacity_increase.helper: Expected percentage increase in bottleneck capacity after the investment.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Operating Hours per Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned operating hours of the bottleneck resource per year.

profit_margin_per_unit.label: Profit Margin per Unit ($)
profit_margin_per_unit.helper: Contribution margin (revenue minus variable cost) per unit of product flowing through the bottleneck.

quality_yield.label: Quality Yield at Bottleneck (%)
quality_yield.helper: First-pass yield (percentage of good units) at the bottleneck operation.

maintenance_downtime_percent.label: Planned Maintenance Downtime (%)
maintenance_downtime_percent.helper: Percentage of total operating time allocated to planned maintenance for the bottleneck.

risk_factor.label: Implementation Risk Factor
risk_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment of the risk that the investment will not achieve the expected capacity increase.

fixedcosts.label: Total Fixed Costs
fixedcosts.helper: Sum of all fixed expenses (rent, salaries, insurance) per period.

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Cost per Unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Direct material, labor, and overhead per unit.

actualsalesvolume.label: Actual Sales Volume
actualsalesvolume.helper: Number of units actually sold in the period.

capacityvolume.label: Maximum Capacity Volume
capacityvolume.helper: Theoretical maximum output under normal operating conditions.

demanduncertainty.label: Demand Uncertainty Factor
demanduncertainty.helper: Expected percentage variation in demand (coefficient of variation).

costescalationrate.label: Cost Escalation Rate
costescalationrate.helper: Annual expected increase in variable costs (inflation, supplier pricing).

includetax.label: Include Tax Effect
includetax.helper: If true, tax rate input is required and after-tax break-even is calculated.

taxrate.label: Tax Rate
taxrate.helper: Effective corporate tax rate, used only when includeTax is true.

calibration_interval_days.label: Calibration Interval (days)
calibration_interval_days.helper: Standard calibration frequency per ISO 17025 or manufacturer recommendation.

days_since_last_calibration.label: Days Since Last Calibration
days_since_last_calibration.helper: Actual elapsed time since the most recent calibration event.

measurement_tolerance_pct.label: Measurement Tolerance (%)
measurement_tolerance_pct.helper: Maximum allowable deviation from nominal value, typically defined by process specs or Six Sigma limits.

observed_drift_pct.label: Observed Drift (%)
observed_drift_pct.helper: Measured deviation from nominal at last verification, expressed as percentage of full scale.

environmental_stress_factor.label: Environmental Stress Factor
environmental_stress_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment of temperature, humidity, vibration, and contamination effects on drift rate.

criticality_level.label: Criticality Level
criticality_level.helper: Impact of measurement error on product quality, safety, or regulatory compliance (per ISO 9001 risk-based thinking).

historical_failure_rate.label: Historical Failure Rate (per 100 calibrations)
historical_failure_rate.helper: Number of times the instrument exceeded tolerance in the last 100 calibration events, used for reliability trending.

data_confidence_score.label: Data Confidence Score (0-100)
data_confidence_score.helper: Subjective or calculated measure of data quality based on measurement system analysis (MSA) per AIAG MSA manual.

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects basal metabolic rate (BMR) due to changes in lean body mass and hormonal factors.

gender.label: Gender
gender.helper: Gender influences BMR through differences in body composition and hormonal profiles.

weight.label: Weight
weight.helper: Body weight is a primary driver of energy expenditure and calorie needs.

height.label: Height
height.helper: Height is used in BMR equations to estimate lean body mass and metabolic rate.

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity multiplier adjusts TDEE based on occupational and exercise habits.

goalrate.label: Weight Loss Rate
goalrate.helper: Desired weekly weight loss rate determines the daily calorie deficit target.

bodyfatpercent.label: Body Fat Percentage
bodyfatpercent.helper: Optional input for more accurate BMR estimation using the Katch-McArdle formula.

ispregnant.label: Pregnant
ispregnant.helper: Pregnancy increases energy requirements; deficit is not recommended during pregnancy.

islactating.label: Lactating
islactating.helper: Lactation adds ~500 kcal/day to energy needs; deficit must be adjusted.

electricity_kwh.label: Electricity Consumption
electricity_kwh.helper: Annual electricity usage from utility bills or submeters. Scope 2 emission source.

natural_gas_therms.label: Natural Gas Consumption
natural_gas_therms.helper: Annual natural gas usage from utility bills. Scope 1 emission source.

fuel_diesel_liters.label: Diesel Fuel Consumption (Fleet)
fuel_diesel_liters.helper: Annual diesel consumption for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

fuel_gasoline_liters.label: Gasoline Fuel Consumption (Fleet)
fuel_gasoline_liters.helper: Annual gasoline consumption for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

waste_tonnes.label: Waste Generated
waste_tonnes.helper: Total waste sent to landfill or incineration. Scope 3 emission source.

business_travel_km.label: Business Travel (Air & Rail)
business_travel_km.helper: Annual distance traveled by employees for business purposes (air, rail). Scope 3 emission source.

region.label: Operational Region
region.helper: Geographic region determines emission factors for electricity grid and fuel standards.

data_quality_score.label: Data Quality Score (1-5)
data_quality_score.helper: Subjective score of input data reliability: 1=estimated, 3=measured, 5=audited. Used for confidence adjustment.

energy_consumption.label: Total Energy Consumption
energy_consumption.helper: Annual electrical energy used by the facility (ISO 50001).

energy_source.label: Primary Energy Source
energy_source.helper: The dominant source of electricity (grid mix, solar, wind, natural gas).

fuel_consumption.label: Fossil Fuel Consumption (Fleet & Heating)
fuel_consumption.helper: Total diesel, gasoline, or heating oil used annually (Scope 1 emissions).

waste_generated.label: Total Waste Generated
waste_generated.helper: Annual waste sent to landfill or incineration (WERC guidelines).

recycling_rate.label: Recycling Rate
recycling_rate.helper: Percentage of waste that is recycled or composted (Lean green metrics).

production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
production_volume.helper: Total units produced per year (for intensity-based benchmarking).

transport_distance.label: Average Transport Distance per Unit
transport_distance.placeholder: Enter average transport distance per unit
transport_distance.helper: Average distance raw materials or finished goods travel (logistics carbon).

has_carbon_offset_program.label: Active Carbon Offset Program
has_carbon_offset_program.helper: Indicates if the organization purchases verified carbon credits.

total_imported_tonnes.label: Total Imported Tonnes (steel/aluminum/cement/fertilizer/hydrogen)
total_imported_tonnes.helper: Total mass of CBAM-covered goods imported in the reporting period.

embedded_emissions_per_tonne.label: Embedded Emissions per Tonne
embedded_emissions_per_tonne.helper: Direct and indirect GHG emissions embedded in the imported goods (scope 1+2).

carbon_price_origin.label: Carbon Price Paid in Country of Origin
carbon_price_origin.placeholder: Enter carbon price paid in country of origin
carbon_price_origin.helper: Effective carbon price already paid in the exporting country (e.g., EU ETS equivalent).

cbam_certificate_price.label: CBAM Certificate Price (current auction)
cbam_certificate_price.helper: Latest weekly average auction price of CBAM certificates.

free_allocation_factor.label: Free Allocation Factor for Sector
free_allocation_factor.placeholder: Enter free allocation factor for sector
free_allocation_factor.helper: Proportion of emissions covered by free allowances in the EU ETS for the product sector.

verification_status.label: Verification Status of Embedded Emissions
verification_status.placeholder: Enter verification status of embedded emissions
verification_status.helper: Whether the embedded emissions data has been independently verified by an accredited body.

compliance_deadline_met.label: Compliance Deadline Met (quarterly report submitted)
compliance_deadline_met.placeholder: Enter compliance deadline met (quarterly report submitted)
compliance_deadline_met.helper: Indicates if the importer submitted the required CBAM report before the quarterly deadline.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total output of the primary product (e.g., steel, cement, aluminum) in metric tons per year.

carbon_intensity.label: Carbon Intensity
carbon_intensity.helper: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions per ton of product, based on ISO 14064 or GHG Protocol.

cbam_carbon_price.label: CBAM Carbon Price
cbam_carbon_price.helper: Expected or current EU ETS allowance price used for CBAM certificate calculation.

free_allocation_percentage.label: Free Allocation Percentage
free_allocation_percentage.helper: Percentage of emissions covered by free allowances under CBAM transitional rules.

production_efficiency_index.label: Production Efficiency Index
production_efficiency_index.helper: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher values reduce waste and emissions.

compliance_readiness_score.label: Compliance Readiness Score
compliance_readiness_score.helper: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness per CBAM requirements.

industry_benchmark_intensity.label: Industry Benchmark Intensity
industry_benchmark_intensity.helper: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).

emission_scope.label: Emission Scope
emission_scope.helper: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.

use_verified_data.label: Use Verified Data Only
use_verified_data.helper: If true, only data from verified sources (e.g., accredited verifier) is used; otherwise estimated data may be included.

celsius_input.label: Temperature in Celsius
celsius_input.helper: Process temperature reading from sensor or manual measurement. Must be above absolute zero.

sensor_accuracy.label: Sensor Accuracy (±°C)
sensor_accuracy.helper: Manufacturer-specified accuracy of the temperature sensor (ISO 17025 calibration standard).

calibration_offset.label: Calibration Offset
calibration_offset.helper: Field calibration adjustment to align sensor with reference standard (NIST traceable).

unit_system.label: Target Unit System
unit_system.helper: Select output temperature scale for downstream process or reporting (ISO 80000-5).

enable_alerts.label: Enable Process Alerts
enable_alerts.helper: Toggle threshold-based alerts for out-of-spec temperature conditions (Six Sigma control limits).

changeover_time_matrix.label: Changeover Time Matrix (minutes)
changeover_time_matrix.helper: Average time to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.

number_of_changeovers_per_month.label: Number of Changeovers per Month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.placeholder: Enter number of changeovers per month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.helper: Total changeovers performed monthly across all shifts. Used to calculate total changeover downtime.

setup_external_time.label: External Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.placeholder: Enter external setup time per changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.helper: Setup activities that can be performed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). Target for SMED optimization.

setup_internal_time.label: Internal Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.placeholder: Enter internal setup time per changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.helper: Setup activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary target for reduction via SMED.

product_family_count.label: Number of Product Families
product_family_count.helper: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.

standard_deviation_changeover_time.label: Standard Deviation of Changeover Time (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.placeholder: Enter standard deviation of changeover time (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.helper: Measure of variability in changeover times. Used for Six Sigma process capability analysis.

shift_pattern.label: Shift Pattern
shift_pattern.helper: Operating schedule affecting available production time and changeover frequency.

lean_smed_implemented.label: SMED Implementation Status
lean_smed_implemented.helper: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.

target_changeover_time.label: Target Changeover Time (minutes)
target_changeover_time.helper: SMED target for changeover time reduction. Typically <10 minutes for world-class performance.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cutting_speed.helper: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed of the cutting tool relative to workpiece.

feed_rate.label: Feed Rate (f)
feed_rate.helper: ISO 8688-1: Axial advance per revolution.

depth_of_cut.label: Depth of Cut (ap)
depth_of_cut.helper: ISO 8688-1: Radial engagement of the tool.

tool_overhang.label: Tool Overhang (L)
tool_overhang.helper: ISO 3685: Free length of tool holder; affects stiffness.

tool_diameter.label: Tool Diameter (D)
tool_diameter.helper: ISO 3685: Cutter diameter for milling or turning insert diameter.

workpiece_material_hardness.label: Workpiece Material Hardness
workpiece_material_hardness.helper: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

machine_spindle_power.label: Machine Spindle Power (P_m)
machine_spindle_power.helper: ISO 841: Rated power of the spindle motor.

machine_damping_ratio.label: Machine Damping Ratio (ζ)
machine_damping_ratio.helper: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.

tool_material.label: Tool Material
tool_material.helper: ISO 513: Tool substrate affects wear and stiffness.

coolant_application.label: Coolant Application
coolant_application.helper: ISO 13743: Flood coolant reduces thermal effects and can alter chatter.

total_sq_ft.label: Total Area (sq ft)
total_sq_ft.helper: Total cleanable floor area in square feet. Basis for all labor and material calculations.

cleaning_frequency.label: Cleaning Frequency per Week
cleaning_frequency.helper: Number of times the facility is cleaned per week. Affects labor and consumable usage.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Rate ($/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.

labor_burden_percent.label: Labor Burden (%)
labor_burden_percent.helper: Percentage added to labor rate for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.

productivity_sqft_per_hour.label: Productivity Rate (sq ft/hour)
productivity_sqft_per_hour.helper: Average area cleaned per person per hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).

material_cost_per_sqft.label: Material Cost ($/sq ft)
material_cost_per_sqft.helper: Cost of cleaning chemicals, paper, and consumables per square foot per cleaning.

equipment_cost_per_sqft.label: Equipment Cost ($/sq ft)
equipment_cost_per_sqft.helper: Amortized equipment cost (mops, vacuums, buffers) per square foot per cleaning.

overhead_percent.label: Overhead (%)
overhead_percent.helper: Indirect costs (management, office, insurance) as percentage of direct costs.

desired_margin_percent.label: Desired Profit Margin (%)
desired_margin_percent.helper: Target net profit margin on the bid.

waste_factor_percent.label: Waste Factor (%)
waste_factor_percent.helper: Allowance for material waste, rework, and inefficiency (Lean Six Sigma waste reduction).

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Service quality tier. Affects labor productivity and material usage. Healthcare adds 15% to labor.

use_lean_methods.label: Use Lean Methods (5S, Standard Work)
use_lean_methods.placeholder: Enter use lean methods (5s, standard work)
use_lean_methods.helper: If true, applies 10% productivity improvement via Lean techniques.

api_call_volume.label: Monthly API Call Volume
api_call_volume.helper: Total number of API calls made per month, including successful and overrun calls.

overrun_rate.label: Overrun Rate
overrun_rate.helper: Percentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response time threshold (e.g., >200ms).

avg_overrun_duration.label: Average Overrun Duration
avg_overrun_duration.helper: Average extra time beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.

cost_per_call.label: Cost per API Call
cost_per_call.helper: Direct cost per API call (compute, network, storage).

retry_cost_per_call.label: Retry Cost per Call
retry_cost_per_call.helper: Additional cost incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.

retry_rate.label: Retry Rate
retry_rate.helper: Percentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.

data_egress_gb.label: Monthly Data Egress
data_egress_gb.helper: Total data transferred out of the cloud per month.

egress_cost_per_gb.label: Egress Cost per GB
egress_cost_per_gb.helper: Cost per GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).

sla_penalty_percentage.label: SLA Penalty Percentage
sla_penalty_percentage.helper: Percentage of monthly service fee credited as penalty if SLA is breached.

monthly_service_fee.label: Monthly Service Fee
monthly_service_fee.helper: Base monthly fee paid to the cloud provider.

overrun_threshold_ms.label: Overrun Threshold (SLA)
overrun_threshold_ms.helper: Maximum acceptable response time per the SLA.

region.label: Cloud Region
region.helper: Geographic region of the cloud service, affects egress costs and latency.

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Costs (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: Enter include hidden costs (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, adds estimated hidden costs like customer churn and brand impact.

total_cloud_spend.label: Total Cloud Spend (Monthly)
total_cloud_spend.helper: Total monthly cloud infrastructure cost across all services.

compute_utilization_rate.label: Average Compute Utilization Rate
compute_utilization_rate.helper: Average CPU/memory utilization across all compute instances.

storage_waste_percentage.label: Storage Waste Percentage
storage_waste_percentage.helper: Estimated percentage of storage that is orphaned, unused, or over-provisioned.

idle_resource_count.label: Idle Resource Count
idle_resource_count.helper: Number of compute instances that have been idle for more than 7 days.

data_transfer_out_gb.label: Monthly Data Transfer Out
data_transfer_out_gb.helper: Total outbound data transfer volume per month.

reserved_instance_coverage.label: Reserved Instance Coverage
reserved_instance_coverage.helper: Percentage of compute spend covered by reserved or savings plans.

rightsizing_opportunity_score.label: Rightsizing Opportunity Score
rightsizing_opportunity_score.helper: Aggregate score (0-100) indicating potential savings from instance type adjustments.

cloud_provider.label: Cloud Provider
cloud_provider.helper: Primary cloud provider for cost analysis.

include_network_waste.label: Include Network Waste Analysis
include_network_waste.helper: Toggle to include network-related waste (e.g., data transfer, load balancer inefficiencies).

avg_order_value.label: Average Order Value (AOV)
avg_order_value.helper: Mean revenue per transaction. Used in CLV calculation. Typical range: $20-$200 for B2C, $500-$5000 for B2B.

purchase_frequency.label: Purchase Frequency per Year
purchase_frequency.helper: Number of purchases per customer per year. Derived from historical data or cohort analysis.

customer_lifetime_years.label: Customer Lifetime (Years)
customer_lifetime_years.helper: Average retention period. For subscription models, use 1/churn rate.

gross_margin_pct.label: Gross Margin (%)
gross_margin_pct.helper: Profit margin after COGS. Typical range: 30-70% for product businesses, 60-90% for SaaS.

cac_total.label: Total Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
cac_total.helper: Sum of all marketing and sales costs divided by number of new customers. Includes ad spend, salaries, tools.

retention_rate.label: Annual Retention Rate
retention_rate.helper: Percentage of customers retained year over year. Used for churn adjustment. Industry benchmark: 60-90%.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (Annual)
discount_rate.helper: Cost of capital or required rate of return. Typical range: 8-15%.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Subjective assessment of input data reliability. Low = estimates, High = audited data.

include_churn_adjustment.label: Include Churn Adjustment
include_churn_adjustment.helper: If true, uses retention rate to adjust CLV for churn. Recommended for subscription models.

length_cm.label: Length in Centimeters
length_cm.helper: Measured length in centimeters, typically from calipers, rulers, or CAD models.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty of the measurement (e.g., ±0.05 cm for standard calipers).

conversion_precision.label: Conversion Precision
conversion_precision.helper: Select the conversion factor precision based on industry standard (ISO 80000-1, NIST).

tolerance_class.label: Tolerance Class
tolerance_class.helper: Tolerance class for dimensional inspection per ISO 2768. Affects alert thresholds.

unit_cost_per_inch.label: Unit Cost per Inch
unit_cost_per_inch.helper: Cost per inch of material or product, used for cost estimation in Lean/Six Sigma projects.

batch_quantity.label: Batch Quantity
batch_quantity.helper: Number of units in the batch for total cost and waste calculations.

material_type.label: Material Type
material_type.helper: Material selection directly impacts tool wear, cutting speed, and cost per part.

part_weight_kg.label: Part Weight (kg)
part_weight_kg.helper: Weight of the finished part, used to calculate raw material cost and scrap.

stock_volume_cm3.label: Stock Volume (cm³)
stock_volume_cm3.helper: Volume of raw material block before machining, determines material usage.

machining_time_min.label: Machining Time (minutes)
machining_time_min.helper: Total cycle time per part including cutting, tool changes, and rapid moves.

setup_time_min.label: Setup Time (minutes)
setup_time_min.helper: Time to fixture, align, and program the machine for the batch.

batch_size.label: Batch Size (parts)
batch_size.helper: Number of identical parts produced in one production run.

machine_hourly_rate_usd.label: Machine Hourly Rate ($/hr)
machine_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Fully burdened machine cost including depreciation, maintenance, and energy.

labor_hourly_rate_usd.label: Labor Hourly Rate ($/hr)
labor_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Operator wage including overhead and benefits.

tooling_cost_per_part_usd.label: Tooling Cost per Part ($)
tooling_cost_per_part_usd.helper: Consumable tooling cost allocated per part (inserts, drills, end mills).

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead Percentage (%)
overhead_percentage.helper: Facility, quality, and administrative overhead as a percentage of direct costs.

scrap_rate_percent.label: Scrap Rate (%)
scrap_rate_percent.helper: Percentage of parts that fail inspection and are scrapped.

material_cost_per_kg_usd.label: Material Cost per kg ($/kg)
material_cost_per_kg_usd.helper: Price of raw material per kilogram, varies by material type.

density_g_per_cm3.label: Density (g/cm³)
density_g_per_cm3.helper: Material density used to convert volume to weight.

annual_manual_labor_cost.label: Annual Manual Labor Cost (per FTE)
annual_manual_labor_cost.placeholder: Enter annual manual labor cost (per fte)
annual_manual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual cost per full-time equivalent worker including wages, benefits, and overhead.

number_of_workers.label: Number of Workers Replaced
number_of_workers.helper: Number of manual workers that could be replaced or augmented by one cobot.

cobot_purchase_price.label: Cobot Purchase Price
cobot_purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expenditure for the cobot including end-effector and controller.

cobot_annual_maintenance.label: Cobot Annual Maintenance Cost
cobot_annual_maintenance.helper: Annual service contract, spare parts, and software updates.

cobot_lifespan_years.label: Cobot Lifespan
cobot_lifespan_years.helper: Expected operational life before major overhaul or replacement.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital for NPV calculation.

labor_productivity_factor.label: Manual Labor Productivity Factor
labor_productivity_factor.helper: Efficiency factor for manual labor (1.0 = 100% productive, 0.85 = typical with breaks/errors).

cobot_uptime_percent.label: Cobot Uptime
cobot_uptime_percent.helper: Percentage of scheduled time the cobot is operational (excluding planned maintenance).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Number of shifts per day the cobot will operate (manual labor typically single shift).

include_training_cost.label: Include Cobot Training Cost
include_training_cost.helper: Whether to include initial training and integration costs.

training_cost.label: Cobot Training & Integration Cost
training_cost.helper: One-time cost for programming, safety validation, and operator training.

system_pressure.label: System Pressure
system_pressure.helper: Operating pressure of the compressed air system; higher pressure increases leak flow rate.

leak_diameter.label: Equivalent Leak Diameter
leak_diameter.helper: Diameter of a round orifice representing the average leak size. Common sizes: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".

number_of_leaks.label: Number of Leaks
number_of_leaks.helper: Total number of identified or estimated leaks in the system.

operating_hours.label: Annual Operating Hours
operating_hours.helper: Total hours the compressor runs per year. Continuous operation = 8760 h.

electricity_cost.label: Electricity Cost
electricity_cost.helper: Average blended cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour.

compressor_efficiency.label: Compressor Efficiency
compressor_efficiency.helper: Overall efficiency of the compressor system (motor + drive + compressor). Typical range 70-85%.

leak_type.label: Leak Type
leak_type.helper: Geometry of the leak affects discharge coefficient. Round orifice is most common.

include_maintenance_cost.label: Include Maintenance Cost
include_maintenance_cost.helper: If true, adds estimated labor and material cost for leak repair.

compressorflowrate.label: Compressor Flow Rate
compressorflowrate.helper: Rated free air delivery of the compressor at standard conditions.

demandflowrate.label: Average Demand Flow Rate
demandflowrate.helper: Average compressed air consumption of the system.

peakduration.label: Peak Demand Duration
peakduration.helper: Duration of the peak demand event.

systempressure.label: System Operating Pressure
systempressure.helper: Nominal pressure at which the system operates.

pressuredifferential.label: Allowable Pressure Differential
pressuredifferential.helper: Maximum acceptable pressure drop during peak event.

compressorcontroltype.label: Compressor Control Type
compressorcontroltype.helper: Type of compressor capacity control, affects tank sizing factor.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temperature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average ambient temperature at compressor location.

altitude.label: Altitude Above Sea Level
altitude.helper: Site elevation for air density correction.

systemleakagepercent.label: System Leakage Estimate
systemleakagepercent.helper: Estimated percentage of compressed air lost to leaks.

applicationtype.label: Application Type
applicationtype.helper: Primary use case, influences safety factor.

container_type.label: Container Type
container_type.helper: Select the container type to define internal volume and dimensional constraints per ISO 668.

cargo_length_cm.label: Cargo Length (cm)
cargo_length_cm.helper: Length of the primary cargo unit (pallet or box). Must align with container internal length.

cargo_width_cm.label: Cargo Width (cm)
cargo_width_cm.helper: Width of the cargo unit. Affects lateral stacking and aisle space.

cargo_height_cm.label: Cargo Height (cm)
cargo_height_cm.helper: Height of the cargo unit. Must respect container door height and internal height.

cargo_weight_kg.label: Cargo Weight per Unit (kg)
cargo_weight_kg.helper: Weight per cargo unit. Critical for gross weight limit and axle load distribution.

stacking_factor.label: Stacking Factor
stacking_factor.helper: Number of cargo units that can be stacked vertically, considering crush resistance and stability.

load_secure_method.label: Load Securing Method
load_secure_method.helper: Method used to secure cargo. Affects usable volume and weight distribution per CTU Code.

use_pallet.label: Use Pallet
use_pallet.helper: Indicates if cargo is palletized. Pallet dimensions add to base footprint and reduce usable height.

pallet_height_cm.label: Pallet Height (cm)
pallet_height_cm.helper: Height of the pallet (if used). Added to cargo height for total unit height.

actual_throughput.label: Actual Throughput (units)
actual_throughput.helper: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement period.

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts per million defective, measured per Six Sigma standards.

on_time_delivery_percent.label: On-Time Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_percent.helper: Percentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.

cost_per_unit.label: Cost per Unit ($)
cost_per_unit.helper: Total manufacturing cost per unit, including materials, labor, overhead.

target_cost_per_unit.label: Target Cost per Unit ($)
target_cost_per_unit.helper: Contractually agreed cost target per unit.

incentive_base_rate.label: Incentive Base Rate ($/unit)
incentive_base_rate.helper: Base incentive amount per unit, subject to performance multipliers.

quality_threshold_ppm.label: Quality Threshold (ppm)
quality_threshold_ppm.helper: Maximum defect rate to qualify for any incentive.

delivery_threshold_percent.label: Delivery Threshold (%)
delivery_threshold_percent.helper: Minimum on-time delivery percentage to qualify for incentive.

cost_reduction_sharing_percent.label: Cost Reduction Sharing (%)
cost_reduction_sharing_percent.helper: Percentage of cost savings shared as additional incentive.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of contract governing the incentive structure.

lean_certification_active.label: Lean Certification Active
lean_certification_active.helper: Indicates if the supplier holds an active Lean certification (e.g., ISO 18404).

cpk.label: Process Capability Index (Cpk)
cpk.helper: Cpk is a standard Six Sigma metric indicating how well a process meets specification limits, accounting for centering. Typical targets: 1.33 (minimum acceptable), 1.67 (good), 2.0 (excellent).

sigmashift.label: Sigma Shift (long-term drift)
sigmashift.helper: Accounts for long-term process drift. Standard Six Sigma assumption is 1.5 sigma shift. Adjust based on historical data or industry norms (e.g., automotive often uses 1.5).

distributiontype.label: Distribution Type
distributiontype.helper: Select distribution based on sample size and data characteristics. Normal for large samples (n>30), t-distribution for small samples (n<30) to account for uncertainty.

samplesize.label: Sample Size (n)
samplesize.helper: Number of observations used to estimate Cpk. Larger samples improve confidence. Required for t-distribution adjustment.

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level
confidencelevel.helper: Confidence level for the confidence interval of the PPM estimate. Higher levels provide more conservative (wider) intervals.

useconfidenceinterval.label: Use Confidence Interval
useconfidenceinterval.helper: If enabled, the tool calculates lower and upper bounds for PPM based on the confidence level. Useful for risk assessment.

planned_duration_days.label: Planned Duration (Days)
planned_duration_days.helper: Total planned duration of the project from start to finish, as per CPM schedule baseline.

actual_duration_days.label: Actual Duration (Days)
actual_duration_days.helper: Actual elapsed duration from project start to current date or completion.

daily_penalty_rate.label: Daily Penalty Rate (Currency)
daily_penalty_rate.helper: Contractual liquidated damages or penalty per day of delay beyond the planned duration.

critical_path_float_total.label: Total Float on Critical Path (Days)
critical_path_float_total.placeholder: Enter total float on critical path (days)
critical_path_float_total.helper: Sum of total float for all activities on the critical path. Zero or negative indicates schedule compression.

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
productivity_factor.helper: Lean metric: ratio of actual output to standard output. Values below 0.8 indicate significant waste.

rework_percentage.label: Rework Percentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: Percentage of completed work requiring rework, a key Six Sigma quality metric.

delay_type.label: Delay Type
delay_type.helper: Classification per standard construction delay analysis (AACE, SCL protocols).

use_earned_schedule.label: Use Earned Schedule Method
use_earned_schedule.helper: If true, applies earned schedule (ES) metrics for more accurate delay impact assessment.

expected_yield.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)
