repeatability_variation.label: Repeatability Variation (Std Dev)
repeatability_variation.helper: Variation due to equipment (same operator, same part, repeated measurements).

reproducibility_variation.label: Reproducibility Variation (Std Dev)
reproducibility_variation.helper: Variation due to different operators measuring the same part.

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per Defect (Internal)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).

cost_per_escaped_defect.label: Cost per Escaped Defect (External)
cost_per_escaped_defect.helper: Average cost when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced per year for the measured characteristic.

defect_rate.label: Current Defect Rate (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts per million non-conforming based on current measurement system.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses (False Positives/Negatives)
include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, calculates costs from misclassifications due to measurement error.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Operating Hours per Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned operating hours of the equipment per year. Used to calculate failure frequency and downtime.

number_of_units.label: Number of Units
number_of_units.helper: Total number of identical or similar assets in the fleet.

mtbf.label: Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)
mtbf.helper: Average time between failures for a repairable system. Higher is better. ISO 14224.

mttr.label: Mean Time To Repair (MTTR)
mttr.helper: Average time to restore a failed system to operational state. Lower is better. Includes diagnosis, repair, testing.

cost_per_downtime_hour.label: Cost per Downtime Hour
cost_per_downtime_hour.helper: Lost profit or cost incurred per hour of equipment downtime (lost production, labor, penalties).

cost_per_failure_event.label: Cost per Failure Event (excluding downtime)
cost_per_failure_event.placeholder: Enter cost per failure event (excluding downtime)
cost_per_failure_event.helper: Fixed costs per failure: spare parts, logistics, contractor fees, administrative overhead.

maintenance_labor_rate.label: Maintenance Labor Rate
maintenance_labor_rate.helper: Hourly cost of maintenance personnel (including overhead).

reliability_improvement_investment.label: Reliability Improvement Investment (annual)
reliability_improvement_investment.helper: Annual budget allocated to reliability improvement projects (training, redesign, predictive maintenance).

availability_target.label: Availability Target
availability_target.helper: Target operational availability (uptime / total time). Used for gap analysis.

industry_benchmark_mtbf.label: Industry Benchmark MTBF
industry_benchmark_mtbf.helper: Reference MTBF from industry standards (e.g., WERC, ISO) for comparison.

material_cost_per_unit.label: Material Cost per Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct material cost per unit of product, including raw materials and purchased components.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average fully burdened labor cost per hour for direct operators.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Rate
overhead_rate.helper: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (ISO 9001 cost accounting).

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate
defect_rate.helper: Percentage of units produced that are defective and require rework or scrap (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

rework_time_per_unit.label: Rework Time per Unit
rework_time_per_unit.helper: Average time spent reworking a defective unit.

scrap_rate.label: Scrap Rate
scrap_rate.helper: Percentage of defective units that are scrapped (cannot be reworked).

waiting_time_per_unit.label: Waiting Time per Unit
waiting_time_per_unit.helper: Average idle time per unit due to bottlenecks, material shortages, or equipment downtime (Lean Takt time analysis).

excess_motion_cost_per_unit.label: Excess Motion Cost per Unit
excess_motion_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Enter excess motion cost per unit
excess_motion_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost of unnecessary worker movement (walking, reaching) per unit, based on time-motion studies.

inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.label: Inventory Holding Cost per Unit
inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Enter inventory holding cost per unit
inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost of holding one unit in inventory per year (WERC DC Metrics).

overproduction_quantity.label: Overproduction Quantity
overproduction_quantity.helper: Number of units produced beyond customer demand (Muda of overproduction).

transportation_cost_per_unit.label: Transportation Cost per Unit
transportation_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost of moving materials or products between processes (Lean waste of transportation).

processing_waste_per_unit.label: Processing Waste per Unit
processing_waste_per_unit.helper: Cost of unnecessary processing steps or non-value-added operations.

production_volume.label: Production Volume
production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced in the analysis period.

shift_hours_per_day.label: Shift Hours per Day
shift_hours_per_day.helper: Number of operating hours per shift.

working_days_per_year.label: Working Days per Year
working_days_per_year.helper: Number of working days per year.

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Industry sector for benchmarking and threshold adjustment.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses
include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, includes intangible losses such as lost opportunity cost and brand damage.

num_workers_exposed.label: Number of workers exposed
num_workers_exposed.helper: Total headcount in the noise/vibration zone (e.g., assembly line, press shop).

avg_daily_exposure_hours.label: Average daily exposure hours
avg_daily_exposure_hours.helper: Per worker, typical shift duration in the affected area.

noise_level_dba.label: Noise level (A-weighted)
noise_level_dba.helper: Measured at operator position per ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) is typical action level.

vibration_level_ms2.label: Vibration level (RMS acceleration)
vibration_level_ms2.helper: Weighted acceleration per ISO 2631-1. Hand-arm or whole-body.

machine_runtime_hours_per_day.label: Machine runtime per day
machine_runtime_hours_per_day.helper: Total operating hours of the primary noise/vibration source.

maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.label: Annual maintenance cost per machine
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.placeholder: Enter annual maintenance cost per machine
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.helper: Current average spend on repairs and parts for each affected machine.

number_of_machines.label: Number of machines in zone
number_of_machines.placeholder: Enter number of machines in zone
number_of_machines.helper: Count of equipment generating noise/vibration in the assessed area.

avg_worker_annual_salary.label: Average worker annual salary (fully loaded)
avg_worker_annual_salary.placeholder: Enter average worker annual salary (fully loaded)
avg_worker_annual_salary.helper: Includes wages, benefits, overhead. Used to estimate productivity loss.

hearing_protection_cost_per_worker_per_y.label: Hearing protection cost per worker per year
hearing_protection_cost_per_worker_per_y.placeholder: Enter hearing protection cost per worker per year

quality_defect_rate_percent.label: Current defect rate due to vibration
quality_defect_rate_percent.placeholder: Enter current defect rate due to vibration
quality_defect_rate_percent.helper: Estimated percentage of parts affected by vibration-induced quality issues (e.g., surface finish, tolerances).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual production volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total units produced per year in the assessed line.

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per defect (rework + scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost to rework or scrap a defective unit.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: Energy cost per kWh
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Industrial electricity rate.

machine_power_kw.label: Machine power consumption
machine_power_kw.helper: Average power draw per machine during operation.

vibration_reduction_investment.label: Vibration reduction investment (one-time)
vibration_reduction_investment.helper: Budget for dampers, isolators, foundations, or redesign.

noise_reduction_investment.label: Noise reduction investment (one-time)
noise_reduction_investment.helper: Budget for enclosures, silencers, acoustic panels.

iso_standard_compliance.label: ISO standard compliance level
iso_standard_compliance.helper: Select the most relevant standard for threshold evaluation.

initial_investment.label: Initial Investment (CAPEX)
initial_investment.helper: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and commissioning costs.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital reflecting the opportunity cost of capital.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Years)
project_life_years.helper: Expected operational lifespan of the investment per ISO 15686-5.

annual_cash_inflow.label: Annual Cash Inflow
annual_cash_inflow.helper: Expected annual revenue or cost savings generated by the investment.

annual_cash_outflow.label: Annual Cash Outflow
annual_cash_outflow.helper: Annual operating expenses, maintenance, and other recurring costs.

salvage_value.label: Salvage Value
salvage_value.helper: Estimated residual value at the end of project life.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation Rate
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation rate for nominal cash flow adjustments.

tax_rate.label: Effective Tax Rate
tax_rate.helper: Corporate tax rate applied to net income.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Depreciation method for tax shield calculation per GAAP/IFRS.

include_sensitivity.label: Include Sensitivity Analysis
include_sensitivity.helper: Toggle to enable Monte Carlo simulation for risk assessment.

planned_production_time.label: Planned Production Time (minutes)
planned_production_time.helper: Total scheduled time for production in a shift/day (e.g., 8 hours = 480 minutes).

downtime_minutes.label: Total Downtime (minutes)
downtime_minutes.helper: Sum of all unplanned and planned stops (breakdowns, setup, maintenance).

ideal_cycle_time.label: Ideal Cycle Time (minutes per unit)
ideal_cycle_time.placeholder: Enter ideal cycle time (minutes per unit)
ideal_cycle_time.helper: Theoretical fastest time to produce one unit under optimal conditions.

total_parts_produced.label: Total Parts Produced
total_parts_produced.helper: Total count of units produced during the planned production time.

defective_parts.label: Defective Parts
defective_parts.helper: Number of units that do not meet quality standards (scrap, rework).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Type of shift to adjust for fatigue or environmental factors.

include_micro_stops.label: Include Micro-Stops (< 2 min) in Downtime
include_micro_stops.placeholder: Enter include micro-stops (< 2 min) in downtime
include_micro_stops.helper: If true, small stops are counted as downtime per Six Sigma guidelines.

annual_usage_units.label: Annual Usage (units)
annual_usage_units.helper: Total number of office supply units (e.g., reams of paper, pens) consumed per year.

unit_cost.label: Unit Cost
unit_cost.helper: Average purchase cost per unit of the office supply item.

order_cost.label: Order Cost per Purchase Order
order_cost.placeholder: Enter order cost per purchase order
order_cost.helper: Fixed cost associated with placing a single purchase order (labor, processing, etc.).

holding_cost_rate.label: Holding Cost Rate
holding_cost_rate.helper: Annual inventory holding cost as a percentage of unit cost (storage, insurance, obsolescence).

waste_percentage.label: Waste Percentage
waste_percentage.helper: Estimated percentage of supplies wasted due to over-ordering, expiration, or damage.

order_frequency.label: Order Frequency
order_frequency.helper: How often orders are placed, affecting order size and inventory levels.

use_lean_inventory.label: Use Lean Inventory Principles
use_lean_inventory.helper: If enabled, applies just-in-time ordering to reduce holding costs and waste.

voltage.label: Voltage (V)
voltage.helper: Nominal voltage per IEC 60038. Typical industrial values: 230V single-phase, 400V three-phase.

current.label: Current (I)
current.helper: Load current in amperes. Used for conductor sizing and protection coordination.

resistance.label: Resistance (R)
resistance.helper: DC resistance or AC impedance at power frequency. Includes conductor, contact, and load resistance.

powerfactor.label: Power Factor (cos φ)
powerfactor.helper: Ratio of real power to apparent power. Typical industrial loads: 0.8-1.0. Used for AC power calculations.

phasetype.label: Phase Type
phasetype.helper: Single-phase or three-phase system. Affects power calculation formulas per IEC 60364.

temperature.label: Ambient Temperature
temperature.helper: Ambient temperature for resistance temperature correction. Copper conductor TCR = 0.00393 /°C.

current_headcount.label: Current Headcount (FTEs)
current_headcount.helper: Number of full-time equivalent employees currently working in the department or line.

avg_hourly_wage.label: Average Hourly Wage (Base)
avg_hourly_wage.helper: Average base hourly wage for the role, excluding overtime premium.

overtime_premium.label: Overtime Premium Multiplier
overtime_premium.helper: Standard overtime pay multiplier (e.g., 1.5 for time-and-a-half, 2.0 for double time).

overtime_hours_per_week.label: Overtime Hours per Week (per FTE)
overtime_hours_per_week.placeholder: Enter overtime hours per week (per fte)
overtime_hours_per_week.helper: Average overtime hours worked per full-time employee per week.

hiring_cost_per_fte.label: Hiring Cost per FTE
hiring_cost_per_fte.helper: Total cost to recruit, interview, onboard, and train a new employee (including agency fees, training materials, lost productivity).

annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.label: Annual Benefits Cost per FTE
annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.placeholder: Enter annual benefits cost per fte
annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.helper: Annual cost of benefits (health insurance, retirement, paid leave, etc.) per full-time employee.

productivity_factor_overtime.label: Overtime Productivity Factor
productivity_factor_overtime.helper: Productivity during overtime as a percentage of normal shift productivity (e.g., 85% due to fatigue).

productivity_factor_new_hire.label: New Hire Ramp-Up Productivity
productivity_factor_new_hire.helper: Average productivity of a new hire during the first 3 months as a percentage of an experienced employee.

quality_defect_rate_overtime.label: Overtime Defect Rate Increase
quality_defect_rate_overtime.helper: Additional defect rate (in percentage points) observed during overtime shifts due to fatigue.

quality_defect_rate_normal.label: Normal Defect Rate
quality_defect_rate_normal.helper: Baseline defect rate during regular shifts.

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per Defect (rework/scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost to rework or scrap a defective unit (labor, materials, disposal).

weekly_productive_hours_needed.label: Weekly Productive Hours Needed
weekly_productive_hours_needed.helper: Total productive hours required per week to meet demand (adjusted for normal productivity).

weeks_per_year.label: Weeks per Year (operating)
weeks_per_year.helper: Number of weeks per year the operation runs (typically 52 for continuous, 50 for seasonal).

include_risk_adjustment.label: Include Risk Adjustment
include_risk_adjustment.helper: If enabled, applies a risk multiplier to overtime costs to account for burnout, turnover, and safety incidents.

risk_multiplier.label: Overtime Risk Multiplier
risk_multiplier.helper: Multiplier applied to overtime costs when risk adjustment is enabled (based on historical incident data).

cycle_length.label: Average cycle length (days)
cycle_length.helper: Typical range for healthy adult women; used as baseline for ovulation estimation.

luteal_phase_length.label: Luteal phase length (days)
luteal_phase_length.helper: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.

last_period_start.label: Start date of last menstrual period
last_period_start.placeholder: Enter start date of last menstrual period
last_period_start.helper: Reference point for calculating next ovulation and fertile window.

cycle_variability.label: Cycle length variability (standard deviation, days)
cycle_variability.placeholder: Enter cycle length variability (standard deviation, days)
cycle_variability.helper: Used to compute confidence intervals and adjust fertile window width per SPC rules.

age_group.label: Age group
age_group.helper: Age affects cycle regularity and fertility; used for risk adjustment.

has_irregular_cycles.label: Irregular cycles (variation > 7 days)
has_irregular_cycles.helper: Triggers alternative calculation method and alerts for medical consultation.

rack_height_mm.label: Rack Height (mm)
rack_height_mm.helper: Total vertical storage height per rack bay, typically 3-18m in high-bay warehouses.

pallet_depth_mm.label: Pallet Depth (mm)
pallet_depth_mm.helper: Standard pallet depth (e.g., EUR pallet 1200mm, US pallet 1200mm).

pallet_width_mm.label: Pallet Width (mm)
pallet_width_mm.helper: Standard pallet width (e.g., EUR pallet 800mm, US pallet 1000mm).

pallet_height_mm.label: Pallet Height (mm)
pallet_height_mm.helper: Height of a single loaded pallet including pallet base.

beam_thickness_mm.label: Beam Thickness (mm)
beam_thickness_mm.helper: Vertical thickness of horizontal load beams, affects usable height per level.

clearance_vertical_mm.label: Vertical Clearance (mm)
clearance_vertical_mm.helper: Safety gap between top of pallet and next beam for handling equipment.

aisle_width_mm.label: Aisle Width (mm)
aisle_width_mm.helper: Width of forklift travel aisle between rack rows, per OSHA/ISO 3691.

rack_length_mm.label: Rack Bay Length (mm)
rack_length_mm.helper: Horizontal length of a single rack bay (center-to-center of uprights).

num_bays.label: Number of Bays
num_bays.helper: Number of adjacent rack bays in a row.

num_levels.label: Number of Levels
num_levels.helper: Number of horizontal beam levels per bay.

pallet_weight_kg.label: Average Pallet Weight (kg)
pallet_weight_kg.helper: Average weight of a loaded pallet, used for structural load calculations.

utilization_rate.label: Current Utilization Rate (%)
utilization_rate.helper: Percentage of rack positions currently occupied.

storage_strategy.label: Storage Strategy
storage_strategy.helper: Warehouse inventory rotation strategy affecting throughput and space utilization.

forklift_type.label: Forklift Type
forklift_type.helper: Forklift type determines required aisle width and lift height capability.

seismic_zone.label: Seismic Zone
seismic_zone.helper: Seismic classification per ASCE 7 / IBC, affects rack bracing requirements.

include_beam_deflection_check.label: Include Beam Deflection Check
include_beam_deflection_check.helper: If enabled, validates beam deflection against L/180 standard (RMI/ANSI MH16.1).

avg_invoice_value.label: Average Invoice Value
avg_invoice_value.helper: Average monetary value of a single invoice issued to customers.

annual_invoice_count.label: Annual Invoice Count
annual_invoice_count.helper: Total number of invoices issued per year.

current_terms_days.label: Current Payment Terms (Days)
current_terms_days.helper: Current net payment term offered to customers (e.g., Net 30).

proposed_terms_days.label: Proposed Payment Terms (Days)
proposed_terms_days.helper: New net payment term to be evaluated (e.g., Net 15).

early_payment_discount_pct.label: Early Payment Discount (%)
early_payment_discount_pct.helper: Percentage discount offered for early payment (e.g., 2/10 Net 30).

discount_window_days.label: Discount Window (Days)
discount_window_days.helper: Number of days within which the discount can be taken (e.g., 10 days for 2/10).

cost_of_capital_pct.label: Cost of Capital (%)
cost_of_capital_pct.helper: Annual weighted average cost of capital (WACC) for the company.

customer_acceptance_rate_pct.label: Customer Acceptance Rate (%)
customer_acceptance_rate_pct.helper: Estimated percentage of customers who will take the early payment discount.

industry_benchmark_dso.label: Industry Benchmark DSO (Days)
industry_benchmark_dso.helper: Average Days Sales Outstanding for the industry (WERC/CFO benchmarks).

payment_behavior.label: Customer Payment Behavior
payment_behavior.helper: Typical payment behavior of the customer base, used to adjust effective DSO.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner Diameter
pipe_diameter.helper: Nominal pipe diameter per ISO 6708. Affects cross-sectional area and velocity.

pipe_length.label: Pipe Length
pipe_length.helper: Total straight pipe length. Used for friction loss calculation.

flow_rate.label: Volumetric Flow Rate
flow_rate.helper: Design flow rate. Must be within pump capacity and pipe rating.

fluid_density.label: Fluid Density
fluid_density.helper: Density at operating temperature. Water = 1000, oil ≈ 850.

fluid_viscosity.label: Dynamic Viscosity
fluid_viscosity.helper: Dynamic viscosity at operating temperature. Water = 0.001, heavy oil up to 1.

roughness.label: Pipe Roughness
roughness.helper: Absolute roughness height. Steel = 0.000045, concrete = 0.001. Per ISO 9906.

elevation_change.label: Elevation Change
elevation_change.helper: Positive if outlet is higher than inlet. Affects gravitational head.

minor_loss_coefficient.label: Minor Loss Coefficient (K)
minor_loss_coefficient.helper: Sum of K factors for fittings, valves, bends. Per Crane Technical Paper No. 410.

flow_regime.label: Flow Regime Assumption
flow_regime.helper: Select 'auto' for Reynolds-based determination. Override for sensitivity analysis.

include_measurement_uncertainty.label: Include Measurement Uncertainty
include_measurement_uncertainty.helper: When true, applies GUM (Guide to the Expression of Uncertainty in Measurement) propagation to final result.

annual_units.label: Annual Units Produced
annual_units.helper: Total number of units produced per year for the process line where the poka-yoke will be applied.

current_defect_rate.label: Current Defect Rate
current_defect_rate.helper: Current defect rate in parts per million (ppm) for the process step targeted by the poka-yoke.

defect_cost_per_unit.label: Defect Cost per Unit
defect_cost_per_unit.helper: Average total cost incurred per defective unit, including scrap, rework, warranty, and lost customer goodwill.

poka_yoke_effectiveness.label: Poka-Yoke Effectiveness
poka_yoke_effectiveness.helper: Expected percentage of defects that will be prevented by the poka-yoke device or process.

implementation_cost.label: Implementation Cost
implementation_cost.helper: Total one-time cost to design, purchase, install, and validate the poka-yoke solution.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Recurring yearly cost for calibration, spare parts, and upkeep of the poka-yoke system.

labor_hours_saved_per_year.label: Labor Hours Saved per Year
labor_hours_saved_per_year.placeholder: Enter labor hours saved per year
labor_hours_saved_per_year.helper: Estimated reduction in inspection and rework labor hours per year due to the poka-yoke.

labor_rate.label: Labor Rate
labor_rate.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor cost for operators and inspectors.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate
discount_rate.helper: Annual discount rate used for net present value (NPV) calculation, reflecting the cost of capital.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Years)
project_life_years.helper: Expected useful life of the poka-yoke solution before major redesign or replacement.

lmp_date.label: Last Menstrual Period (LMP) Date
lmp_date.helper: Date of the first day of the last menstrual period, used as the baseline for gestational age calculation.

cycle_length.label: Average Cycle Length
cycle_length.helper: Average length of the woman's menstrual cycle in days. Deviations from 28 days adjust the due date estimate.

luteal_phase_length.label: Luteal Phase Length
luteal_phase_length.helper: Length of the luteal phase (post-ovulation). Typically 14 days, but can vary. Used to refine ovulation date.

ultrasound_ga_weeks.label: Ultrasound Gestational Age (weeks)
ultrasound_ga_weeks.helper: Gestational age measured by ultrasound (crown-rump length). If provided, overrides LMP-based estimate.

ultrasound_ga_days.label: Ultrasound Gestational Age (additional days)
ultrasound_ga_days.helper: Remaining days beyond weeks for ultrasound gestational age.

cycle_variability.label: Cycle Variability (standard deviation)
cycle_variability.helper: Standard deviation of cycle length, used to compute confidence intervals and data confidence adjustment.

parity.label: Parity (number of previous births)
parity.helper: Number of previous live births. Used in risk stratification (e.g., grand multiparity).

risk_factors.label: Risk Factors Present
risk_factors.helper: Presence of known risk factors that may affect due date reliability or require additional monitoring.

design_pressure.label: Design Pressure (P)
design_pressure.helper: Maximum allowable working pressure per ASME UG-21

allowable_stress.label: Allowable Stress (S)
allowable_stress.helper: Material allowable stress at design temperature per ASME II Part D

joint_efficiency.label: Joint Efficiency (E)
joint_efficiency.helper: Welded joint efficiency factor per ASME UW-12

corrosion_allowance.label: Corrosion Allowance (CA)
corrosion_allowance.helper: Additional thickness for corrosion/erosion per UG-25

material_utilization.label: Material Utilization Factor
material_utilization.helper: Lean manufacturing metric for material waste reduction

safety_factor_override.label: Override Safety Factor
safety_factor_override.helper: Enable to use custom safety factor instead of ASME default 3.5

custom_safety_factor.label: Custom Safety Factor
custom_safety_factor.helper: Only used if override is enabled; typical range per ISO 16528

current_price.label: Current Price per Unit
current_price.helper: The current selling price of the product in USD.

current_quantity.label: Current Quantity Sold (units/month)
current_quantity.helper: Monthly sales volume at current price.

price_change_percent.label: Proposed Price Change (%)
price_change_percent.helper: Percentage change in price (negative for decrease, positive for increase).

elasticity_coefficient.label: Price Elasticity of Demand (PED)
elasticity_coefficient.helper: Estimated elasticity coefficient (typically negative). Absolute value >1 indicates elastic demand.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable Cost per Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct variable cost per unit (materials, labor, etc.).

fixed_cost_monthly.label: Fixed Cost per Month
fixed_cost_monthly.helper: Total fixed costs allocated per month.

demand_shift_factor.label: Demand Shift Factor (seasonality/market)
demand_shift_factor.helper: Multiplier to adjust baseline demand (e.g., 1.2 for 20% market growth).

confidence_level.label: Data Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Quality of input data: low = ±20% error, medium = ±10%, high = ±5%.

apply_six_sigma_adjustment.label: Apply Six Sigma Process Adjustment
apply_six_sigma_adjustment.placeholder: Enter apply six sigma process adjustment
apply_six_sigma_adjustment.helper: If true, applies a 1.5 sigma shift to account for process variation (DMAIC).

material_weight.label: Material Weight
material_weight.helper: Total weight of raw materials used in the product, including all components and packaging.

material_type.label: Material Type
material_type.helper: Primary material category to determine emission factors per ISO 14067.

energy_consumption.label: Energy Consumption in Manufacturing
energy_consumption.helper: Total electrical energy used during production processes (machining, assembly, etc.).

transport_distance.label: Transport Distance
transport_distance.helper: Average distance from raw material source to manufacturing facility, and from facility to customer.

transport_mode.label: Transport Mode
transport_mode.helper: Mode of transport affecting emission factors per ton-km (WERC guidelines).

recycled_content.label: Recycled Content
recycled_content.helper: Percentage of recycled material in the product, reducing virgin material emissions.

use_phase_efficiency.label: Use Phase Efficiency
use_phase_efficiency.helper: Annual energy consumption of the product during its use phase (e.g., for appliances).

lifespan.label: Product Lifespan
lifespan.helper: Expected useful life of the product, used to allocate use-phase emissions.

end_of_life_recycling_rate.label: End-of-Life Recycling Rate
end_of_life_recycling_rate.helper: Percentage of product mass that is recycled at end of life, reducing disposal emissions.

energy_source.label: Energy Source
energy_source.helper: Type of energy used in manufacturing, affecting emission factor per kWh.

avg_volume_per_sku.label: Average Volume per SKU
avg_volume_per_sku.helper: Average annual production quantity per SKU.

num_components.label: Number of Unique Components
num_components.helper: Total distinct raw materials or parts used across all SKUs.

avg_bom_levels.label: Average BOM Levels
avg_bom_levels.helper: Average depth of the bill of materials (number of subassembly tiers).

setup_time_minutes.label: Average Setup Time per Changeover
setup_time_minutes.placeholder: Enter average setup time per changeover
setup_time_minutes.helper: Average time to change a production line from one SKU to another.

labor_rate.label: Labor Rate
labor_rate.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor cost.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Rate
overhead_rate.helper: Manufacturing overhead as percentage of direct labor and material.

complexity_type.label: Complexity Type
complexity_type.helper: Category of complexity: 'product' (high SKU count), 'process' (high setup time), 'mixed' (both).

use_lean_metrics.label: Use Lean Metrics (SMED, OEE)
use_lean_metrics.helper: If true, applies SMED-based setup reduction and OEE factors.

labor_hours.label: Direct Labor Hours
labor_hours.helper: Total planned direct labor hours for the project, based on work breakdown structure (WBS).

labor_rate.label: Average Labor Rate
labor_rate.helper: Weighted average hourly rate including wages, benefits, and overhead per ISO 15686-5.

material_cost.label: Material Cost
material_cost.helper: Total cost of raw materials and purchased components, including procurement and logistics.

equipment_cost.label: Equipment & Tooling Cost
equipment_cost.helper: Cost of specialized machinery, tooling, and equipment depreciation or rental.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead Percentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Indirect cost rate (facilities, utilities, management) as a percentage of direct costs, per standard cost accounting.

complexity_factor.label: Project Complexity Factor
complexity_factor.helper: Adjusts cost based on project complexity (low/medium/high) per PMI and Lean principles.

quality_level.label: Quality Level (Sigma)
quality_level.helper: Target quality level based on Six Sigma; higher sigma reduces rework and hidden costs.

use_lean_standardization.label: Apply Lean Standardization
use_lean_standardization.helper: If true, applies lean waste reduction factor (e.g., 5% reduction in labor and material).

plannedduration.label: Planned Duration (months)
plannedduration.helper: Original planned project duration in months as per baseline schedule.

actualduration.label: Actual Duration to Date (months)
actualduration.helper: Elapsed time since project start, used to compute schedule performance.

plannedcost.label: Planned Total Cost (USD)
plannedcost.helper: Total budgeted cost for the project at completion.

actualcost.label: Actual Cost Incurred (USD)
actualcost.helper: Total costs actually incurred up to the current reporting period.

percentcomplete.label: Percent Complete (%)
percentcomplete.helper: Estimated percentage of work completed based on earned value or physical progress.

scopechangefrequency.label: Scope Change Frequency
scopechangefrequency.helper: Frequency of scope changes affecting project baseline. Low = 0-1 changes, Moderate = 2-4, High = 5+.

teamexperience.label: Team Experience Level
teamexperience.helper: Average experience level of the core project team.

qualitydefectrate.label: Quality Defect Rate (defects per unit)
qualitydefectrate.placeholder: Enter quality defect rate (defects per unit)
qualitydefectrate.helper: Number of defects per unit of output (e.g., per 1000 lines of code, per 100 parts).

supplierreliability.label: Supplier Reliability Index
supplierreliability.helper: Probability that critical suppliers deliver on time and within spec (0 = unreliable, 1 = fully reliable).

riskexposure.label: Risk Exposure (USD)
riskexposure.helper: Monetary value of identified risks (probability * impact) not yet mitigated.

pressure_psi.label: Pressure (PSI)
pressure_psi.helper: Input pressure in pounds per square inch (PSI). Typical range: 0–100,000 psi for industrial applications.

temperature_celsius.label: Temperature (°C)
temperature_celsius.helper: Process temperature in Celsius. Used for thermal correction per ISO 80000-1.

altitude_meters.label: Altitude (m)
altitude_meters.helper: Altitude above sea level for barometric correction. Relevant for high-altitude installations.

fluid_type.label: Fluid Type
fluid_type.helper: Select fluid type for density correction. Options: water, oil, gas, steam.

include_temperature_correction.label: Apply Temperature Correction
include_temperature_correction.helper: Enable thermal expansion correction for pressure measurement.

include_altitude_correction.label: Apply Altitude Correction
include_altitude_correction.helper: Enable barometric pressure correction based on altitude.

coefficient_a.label: Coefficient a (quadratic term)
coefficient_a.helper: Leading coefficient of the quadratic equation ax² + bx + c = 0. Must be non-zero for a valid quadratic.

coefficient_b.label: Coefficient b (linear term)
coefficient_b.helper: Linear coefficient influencing the vertex position and root symmetry.

coefficient_c.label: Coefficient c (constant term)
coefficient_c.helper: Constant term representing the y-intercept of the quadratic function.

precision_mode.label: Precision Mode
precision_mode.helper: Selects rounding and display precision: standard (4 decimals), high (8 decimals), engineering (scientific notation).

use_complex_roots.label: Allow Complex Roots
use_complex_roots.helper: When true, the calculator returns complex roots for negative discriminants. When false, it returns an error for non-real roots.

total_sales.label: Total Sales Revenue
total_sales.helper: Annual total sales revenue used as a baseline for cost ratio calculations.

prevention_training_cost.label: Prevention Training Cost
prevention_training_cost.helper: Costs for quality training, process planning, and preventive maintenance.

prevention_design_cost.label: Prevention Design/Process Control Cost
prevention_design_cost.helper: Costs for FMEA, design reviews, and process control implementation.

appraisal_inspection_cost.label: Appraisal Inspection & Testing Cost
appraisal_inspection_cost.helper: Costs for incoming, in-process, and final inspection and testing.

appraisal_audit_cost.label: Appraisal Audit & Calibration Cost
appraisal_audit_cost.helper: Costs for internal/external audits and equipment calibration.

internal_failure_scrap_cost.label: Internal Failure Scrap & Rework Cost
internal_failure_scrap_cost.placeholder: Enter internal failure scrap & rework cost
internal_failure_scrap_cost.helper: Costs of scrap, rework, and downtime due to defects before delivery.

internal_failure_downtime_cost.label: Internal Failure Downtime Cost
internal_failure_downtime_cost.helper: Lost production time due to quality issues.

external_failure_warranty_cost.label: External Failure Warranty & Returns Cost
external_failure_warranty_cost.placeholder: Enter external failure warranty & returns cost
external_failure_warranty_cost.helper: Costs for warranty claims, returns, and replacements after delivery.

external_failure_liability_cost.label: External Failure Liability & Lost Sales Cost
external_failure_liability_cost.placeholder: Enter external failure liability & lost sales cost
external_failure_liability_cost.helper: Costs from lawsuits, penalties, and lost future sales due to poor quality.

quality_improvement_investment.label: Quality Improvement Investment (Optional)
quality_improvement_investment.helper: Additional investment in quality improvement initiatives (e.g., Six Sigma projects).

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Industry context for benchmarking and threshold adjustments.

include_hidden_drivers.label: Include Hidden Loss Drivers
include_hidden_drivers.helper: Toggle to include intangible costs like lost customer goodwill and overtime.

order_volume.label: Order Volume (units)
order_volume.helper: Total quantity of items in the quote. Higher volumes may reduce unit cost but increase risk exposure.

unit_price.label: Unit Price ($)
unit_price.helper: Price per unit quoted to the customer.

production_lead_time_days.label: Production Lead Time (days)
production_lead_time_days.helper: Time from order placement to delivery. Longer lead times increase demand forecast risk.

material_cost_variability.label: Material Cost Variability (%)
material_cost_variability.helper: Expected fluctuation in raw material costs during the lead time. Based on historical volatility.

labor_skill_level.label: Labor Skill Level
labor_skill_level.helper: Skill level of the workforce assigned to the project. Low skill increases defect risk.

quality_defect_rate.label: Historical Defect Rate (%)
quality_defect_rate.helper: Historical percentage of defective units from similar production runs. Used for Six Sigma DPMO calculation.

logistics_complexity.label: Logistics Complexity Score
logistics_complexity.helper: Score based on number of shipping modes, customs requirements, and distance. Higher score increases risk.

customer_credit_rating.label: Customer Credit Rating
customer_credit_rating.helper: Standard credit rating of the customer. Lower ratings increase payment default risk.

contract_penalty_clause.label: Contract Penalty Clause
contract_penalty_clause.helper: Whether the contract includes penalty clauses for late delivery or non-conformance.

labor_rate.label: Labor Rate (per hour)
labor_rate.helper: Average hourly wage including burden for direct labor operators.

labor_hours_per_cycle.label: Labor Hours per Cycle
labor_hours_per_cycle.helper: Standard time per production cycle (e.g., per unit or batch).

material_cost_per_unit.label: Material Cost per Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct material cost per unit of output.

energy_cost_per_cycle.label: Energy Cost per Cycle
energy_cost_per_cycle.helper: Electricity, gas, or other energy costs per production cycle.

maintenance_cost_per_cycle.label: Maintenance Cost per Cycle
maintenance_cost_per_cycle.helper: Average preventive and corrective maintenance cost allocated per cycle.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Rate (%)
overhead_rate.helper: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover indirect expenses (ISO 14051).

cycle_time_minutes.label: Cycle Time (minutes)
cycle_time_minutes.helper: Actual cycle time per unit; used for throughput and efficiency calculations.

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate (%)
defect_rate.helper: Percentage of units that fail quality inspection (Six Sigma metric).

rework_cost_per_defect.label: Rework Cost per Defect
rework_cost_per_defect.helper: Additional cost to rework or scrap a defective unit.

production_volume.label: Production Volume (units/month)
production_volume.helper: Monthly production quantity used to scale recurring costs.

shift_pattern.label: Shift Pattern
shift_pattern.helper: Determines labor multiplier and overhead allocation (Lean standard).

include_environmental_cost.label: Include Environmental Cost (ISO 14000)
include_environmental_cost.helper: If true, adds estimated environmental compliance and waste disposal costs.

system_capacity_kw.label: System Capacity (kW)
system_capacity_kw.helper: Total installed capacity of the renewable energy system (solar, wind, etc.)

annual_energy_output_kwh.label: Annual Energy Output (kWh)
annual_energy_output_kwh.helper: Expected annual electricity generation based on location, technology, and degradation factors

capital_cost_usd.label: Total Capital Cost (USD)
capital_cost_usd.helper: Total upfront investment including equipment, installation, permits, and commissioning

annual_operating_cost_usd.label: Annual Operating & Maintenance Cost (USD)
annual_operating_cost_usd.helper: Recurring costs for maintenance, insurance, monitoring, and repairs

electricity_price_usd_per_kwh.label: Grid Electricity Price (USD/kWh)
electricity_price_usd_per_kwh.helper: Current or projected price of grid electricity, used to calculate savings

inflation_rate_percent.label: Annual Inflation Rate (%)
inflation_rate_percent.helper: Expected annual inflation rate affecting future electricity prices and costs

discount_rate_percent.label: Discount Rate (%)
discount_rate_percent.helper: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return

system_lifetime_years.label: System Lifetime (Years)
system_lifetime_years.helper: Expected operational life of the renewable energy system

degradation_rate_percent.label: Annual Degradation Rate (%)
degradation_rate_percent.helper: Annual reduction in energy output due to aging (e.g., solar panel degradation)

incentive_tax_credit_percent.label: Tax Credit / Incentive (%)
incentive_tax_credit_percent.helper: One-time incentive or tax credit as percentage of capital cost (e.g., ITC)

carbon_credit_usd_per_ton.label: Carbon Credit Value (USD/ton CO2)
carbon_credit_usd_per_ton.helper: Monetary value per ton of CO2 avoided, if applicable

energy_source.label: Energy Source Type
energy_source.helper: Type of renewable energy technology for benchmarking and degradation curves

include_carbon_benefits.label: Include Carbon Benefits in ROI?
include_carbon_benefits.placeholder: Enter include carbon benefits in roi?
include_carbon_benefits.helper: Toggle to include or exclude carbon credit revenue in financial calculations

total_area_sqft.label: Total Renovation Area (sq ft)
total_area_sqft.helper: Total floor area to be renovated, including all rooms and corridors.

scope_complexity.label: Scope Complexity
scope_complexity.helper: Low: cosmetic only; Medium: structural and MEP changes; High: full gut renovation with new systems.

material_quality.label: Material Quality Tier
material_quality.helper: Economy: budget finishes; Standard: mid-range; Premium: high-end, sustainable materials.

labor_efficiency_factor.label: Labor Efficiency Factor
labor_efficiency_factor.helper: Average labor hours per square foot based on historical data and crew productivity.

waste_factor_pct.label: Waste Factor (%)
waste_factor_pct.helper: Expected material waste percentage due to cutting, errors, and over-ordering.

contingency_pct.label: Contingency (%)
contingency_pct.helper: Budget reserve for unforeseen issues (e.g., hidden damage, code upgrades).

region_cost_index.label: Regional Cost Index
region_cost_index.helper: Multiplier for local labor and material cost variations (1.0 = national average).

sustainability_target.label: Sustainability Target
sustainability_target.helper: If pursuing certification, additional costs for documentation, commissioning, and materials.

phased_renovation.label: Phased Renovation
phased_renovation.helper: True if renovation is done in phases (e.g., floor by floor) to reduce disruption.

avg_cover_price.label: Average Cover Price (Menu Price)
avg_cover_price.helper: Average price paid per guest for a main dish or complete meal as listed on the menu.

food_cost_per_cover.label: Food Cost per Cover
food_cost_per_cover.helper: Direct ingredient cost allocated to each cover (plate cost).

labor_cost_per_cover.label: Labor Cost per Cover
labor_cost_per_cover.helper: Direct labor (kitchen + service) cost per guest.

overhead_per_cover.label: Overhead per Cover
overhead_per_cover.helper: Rent, utilities, insurance, and other fixed costs allocated per cover.

waste_percentage.label: Food Waste Percentage
waste_percentage.helper: Percentage of food purchased that is discarded due to spoilage, overproduction, or plate waste.

theft_shrinkage_percentage.label: Theft & Shrinkage Percentage
theft_shrinkage_percentage.helper: Estimated loss of inventory due to theft, misreporting, or unrecorded consumption.

discount_comp_percentage.label: Discount & Comp Percentage
discount_comp_percentage.helper: Percentage of revenue lost due to employee meals, promotions, comps, and discounts.

covers_per_period.label: Covers per Period (Monthly)
covers_per_period.helper: Total number of guests served in the measurement period (month).

menu_engineering_score.label: Menu Engineering Score (1-10)
menu_engineering_score.helper: Subjective score of menu layout, item placement, and upselling effectiveness (1=poor, 10=excellent).

lean_kitchen_maturity.label: Lean Kitchen Maturity Level
lean_kitchen_maturity.helper: Maturity of Lean/Six Sigma practices in kitchen operations (ISO 9001 / Lean principles).

fluid_type.label: Fluid Type
fluid_type.helper: Select the working fluid to auto-populate density and viscosity. Options include water, air, oil, and custom.

density.label: Fluid Density
density.helper: Mass density of the fluid at operating temperature. For water at 20°C: 998.2 kg/m³.

dynamic_viscosity.label: Dynamic Viscosity
dynamic_viscosity.helper: Absolute viscosity of the fluid. For water at 20°C: 0.001002 Pa·s.

velocity.label: Flow Velocity
velocity.helper: Average velocity of the fluid in the pipe cross-section.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner Diameter
pipe_diameter.helper: Internal diameter of the pipe or conduit.

pipe_roughness.label: Pipe Roughness
pipe_roughness.helper: Average height of surface irregularities inside the pipe. For commercial steel: 0.000045 m.

temperature.label: Operating Temperature
temperature.helper: Fluid temperature used for viscosity and density corrections if applicable.

flow_regime_threshold.label: Flow Regime Threshold
flow_regime_threshold.helper: Select threshold standard: 'standard' (Re<2300 laminar, 2300-4000 transitional, >4000 turbulent) or 'conservative' (Re<2000 laminar, 2000-3000 transitional, >3000 turbulent).

initial_investment.label: Initial Investment
initial_investment.helper: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and training costs.

annual_cash_inflow.label: Annual Cash Inflow
annual_cash_inflow.helper: Expected annual net cash inflow from the investment (revenue increase or cost savings).

annual_cash_outflow.label: Annual Cash Outflow
annual_cash_outflow.helper: Annual operating and maintenance costs associated with the investment.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (%)
discount_rate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return per ISO 15663.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Years)
project_life_years.helper: Expected useful life of the investment per ISO 15686.

salvage_value.label: Salvage Value
salvage_value.helper: Estimated residual value at end of project life.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation Rate (%)
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation rate for adjusting future cash flows.

tax_rate.label: Tax Rate (%)
tax_rate.helper: Effective corporate tax rate for after-tax cash flow calculations.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Depreciation method per GAAP/IFRS standards.

risk_adjustment.label: Risk Adjustment Factor
risk_adjustment.helper: Multiplier to discount rate for project risk (1.0 = baseline).

lean_six_sigma_savings.label: Lean Six Sigma Annual Savings
lean_six_sigma_savings.placeholder: Enter lean six sigma annual savings
lean_six_sigma_savings.helper: Additional annual savings from Lean/Six Sigma improvements (DMAIC).

werc_throughput.label: WERC Throughput (units/year)
werc_throughput.helper: Annual throughput per WERC warehouse metrics.

quality_defect_rate.label: Quality Defect Rate (%)
quality_defect_rate.helper: Defect rate per Six Sigma DPMO target (default 1.5% = 4 sigma).

building_length.label: Building Length
building_length.helper: Overall length of the building footprint along the ridge direction.

building_width.label: Building Width
building_width.helper: Overall width of the building footprint perpendicular to the ridge.

roof_pitch.label: Roof Pitch (rise/run ratio)
roof_pitch.helper: Ratio of vertical rise to horizontal run (e.g., 0.5 = 6:12 pitch).

overhang_length.label: Eave Overhang Length
overhang_length.helper: Horizontal projection of the roof beyond the exterior wall.

roof_type.label: Roof Type
roof_type.helper: Geometric configuration of the roof structure.

number_of_floors.label: Number of Floors
number_of_floors.helper: Number of stories; affects complexity and potential waste factors.

waste_factor_percent.label: Material Waste Factor
waste_factor_percent.helper: Percentage allowance for cutting, overlap, and installation losses (ISO 9001 waste reduction).

num_stops.label: Number of Stops
num_stops.helper: Total delivery or service stops on the route.

total_distance.label: Total Route Distance
total_distance.helper: Total distance traveled for the route in kilometers.

avg_speed.label: Average Speed
avg_speed.helper: Average vehicle speed including traffic and stops.

dwell_time_per_stop.label: Dwell Time per Stop
dwell_time_per_stop.helper: Average time spent at each stop for loading/unloading.

driver_hourly_rate.label: Driver Hourly Rate
driver_hourly_rate.helper: Hourly wage cost for the driver.

vehicle_type.label: Vehicle Type
vehicle_type.helper: Type of vehicle used for the route.

traffic_condition.label: Traffic Condition
traffic_condition.helper: Expected traffic condition along the route.

use_optimization.label: Use Optimization Algorithm
use_optimization.helper: Toggle to apply route optimization logic.

total_licenses.label: Total Licenses Purchased
total_licenses.helper: Total number of SaaS licenses paid for in the current period.

active_users.label: Active Users (Monthly)
active_users.helper: Number of distinct users who logged in at least once in the last 30 days.

license_cost_per_month.label: License Cost per Month
license_cost_per_month.helper: Monthly recurring cost per license, including any fixed fees divided by license count.

implementation_cost.label: One-Time Implementation Cost
implementation_cost.helper: Total cost of onboarding, training, and integration for the SaaS tool.

monthly_support_cost.label: Monthly Support & Admin Cost
monthly_support_cost.helper: Recurring internal labor and third-party support costs to maintain the tool.

contract_months_remaining.label: Contract Months Remaining
contract_months_remaining.helper: Number of months left in the current contract or commitment period.

utilization_threshold.label: Utilization Threshold for Waste
utilization_threshold.helper: Percentage of active users vs total licenses below which licenses are considered shelfware (Lean waste).

annual_salary.label: Annual Salary (USD)
annual_salary.helper: Total gross annual compensation before taxes and deductions.

work_hours_per_week.label: Work Hours per Week
work_hours_per_week.helper: Standard contractual weekly working hours, excluding unpaid breaks.

paid_weeks_per_year.label: Paid Weeks per Year
paid_weeks_per_year.helper: Total weeks compensated including vacation, sick leave, and holidays.

overtime_multiplier.label: Overtime Multiplier
overtime_multiplier.helper: Standard overtime pay factor per FLSA or local labor law (e.g., 1.5x for >40 hrs/week).

benefits_percentage.label: Benefits & Overhead (% of Salary)
benefits_percentage.helper: Percentage of salary allocated to benefits (health, retirement, payroll taxes, training).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift differentials affect effective hourly cost; night/rotating shifts may require premium pay.

include_productivity_factor.label: Include Productivity Factor (Lean)
include_productivity_factor.helper: If true, applies a productivity loss factor (e.g., 85%) based on typical industrial engineering allowances.

net_sales.label: Net Sales Amount
net_sales.helper: Total revenue from taxable sales before any tax or discounts.

tax_rate.label: Sales Tax Rate
tax_rate.helper: Combined state and local sales tax rate as a percentage.

exempt_ratio.label: Exempt Sales Ratio
exempt_ratio.helper: Percentage of net sales that are tax-exempt (e.g., resale, non-profit).

tax_jurisdiction.label: Tax Jurisdiction
tax_jurisdiction.helper: Level of tax authority: state only, state+county, or state+county+city.

use_sourcing.label: Sourcing Method
use_sourcing.helper: Origin-based (seller's location) or destination-based (buyer's location) tax sourcing.

include_shipping.label: Include Shipping in Taxable Base
include_shipping.placeholder: Enter include shipping in taxable base
include_shipping.helper: Whether shipping and handling charges are subject to sales tax.

shipping_charge.label: Shipping & Handling Charge
shipping_charge.helper: Total shipping and handling fees charged to customers.

project_duration_days.label: Project Duration (days)
project_duration_days.helper: Total planned duration of scaffolding usage on site.

total_scaffold_area_sqm.label: Total Scaffold Area (sqm)
total_scaffold_area_sqm.helper: Total surface area of scaffolding required.

rental_rate_per_sqm_per_day.label: Rental Rate per sqm per day
rental_rate_per_sqm_per_day.placeholder: Enter rental rate per sqm per day
rental_rate_per_sqm_per_day.helper: Daily rental cost per square meter of scaffolding.

transport_cost_per_trip.label: Transport Cost per Trip
transport_cost_per_trip.helper: Cost per delivery or pickup trip for scaffolding materials.

number_of_trips.label: Number of Transport Trips
number_of_trips.helper: Total trips for delivery and return of scaffolding.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage for scaffolding erectors/dismantlers.

erection_hours_per_sqm.label: Erection Hours per sqm
erection_hours_per_sqm.helper: Standard labor hours to erect one square meter of scaffolding.

dismantle_hours_per_sqm.label: Dismantle Hours per sqm
dismantle_hours_per_sqm.helper: Standard labor hours to dismantle one square meter.

utilization_rate.label: Utilization Rate (%)
utilization_rate.helper: Percentage of time scaffolding is actively used vs idle.

waste_factor.label: Waste Factor (%)
waste_factor.helper: Estimated material loss or damage during project.

region.label: Region
region.helper: Geographic region affecting labor rates and standards.

include_insurance.label: Include Insurance Cost
include_insurance.helper: Whether to include insurance premium in total cost.

inputnumber.label: Input Number
inputnumber.helper: The numeric value to be converted. Accepts any real number within double-precision floating-point range.

conversiondirection.label: Conversion Direction
conversiondirection.helper: Select whether to convert from decimal to scientific notation or from scientific notation to decimal.

significantdigits.label: Significant Digits
significantdigits.helper: Number of significant digits in the scientific notation output. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

decimalplaces.label: Decimal Places
decimalplaces.helper: Number of decimal places for the decimal output. Used when converting from scientific to decimal.

engineeringnotation.label: Engineering Notation
engineeringnotation.helper: If true, exponent is forced to a multiple of 3 for engineering applications (IEC 60027).

useepsilon.label: Use Epsilon Threshold
useepsilon.helper: If true, numbers below machine epsilon (2.22e-16) are flagged as potential underflow.

total_units_produced.label: Total Units Produced
total_units_produced.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting period (e.g., shift, day, week).

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Number of units that failed quality inspection or are non-conforming.

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that were reworked to meet specifications (counted separately from scrap).

material_cost_per_unit.label: Material Cost per Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct material cost per unit in USD.

labor_cost_per_unit.label: Labor Cost per Unit
labor_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct labor cost per unit in USD.

overhead_cost_per_unit.label: Overhead Cost per Unit
overhead_cost_per_unit.helper: Allocated overhead cost per unit in USD.

process_stage.label: Process Stage
process_stage.helper: Stage in the production process where scrap is measured.

include_rework_in_scrap.label: Include Rework in Scrap Calculation
include_rework_in_scrap.placeholder: Enter include rework in scrap calculation
include_rework_in_scrap.helper: If true, rework units are treated as scrap for cost calculations (conservative approach).

total_work_content.label: Total Work Content (TWC)
total_work_content.helper: Sum of all standard times for operations in the sewing line (ISO 9001 time measurement).

number_of_operators.label: Number of Operators
number_of_operators.helper: Total direct labor assigned to the line.

takt_time.label: Takt Time
takt_time.helper: Customer demand rate: available production time divided by required output (Lean manufacturing).

bottleneck_time.label: Bottleneck Station Time
bottleneck_time.helper: Longest operation time among all stations (Theory of Constraints).

line_balance_type.label: Line Balance Type
line_balance_type.helper: Configuration of the sewing line: straight, U-shape, or modular (Lean layout principles).

allow_rebalancing.label: Allow Rebalancing
allow_rebalancing.helper: If true, the tool will suggest operator reassignment to improve balance.

shift_duration_hours.label: Shift Duration (hours)
shift_duration_hours.helper: Total scheduled shift time in hours. Standard shifts are 8 or 12 hours.

total_units_produced.label: Total Units Produced
total_units_produced.helper: Total good units produced during the shift, including reworked units.

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Units that failed quality inspection and are not reworkable.

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that required rework to meet quality standards.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average fully loaded labor cost per operator per hour.

number_of_operators.label: Number of Operators
number_of_operators.helper: Total operators assigned to the shift.

material_cost_per_unit.label: Material Cost per Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct material cost per unit produced.

energy_cost_per_shift.label: Energy Cost per Shift
energy_cost_per_shift.helper: Total energy cost (electricity, gas, etc.) for the shift.

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift type affects labor premiums and energy tariffs.

overtime_applied.label: Overtime Applied
overtime_applied.helper: Indicates if overtime rates apply to any portion of the shift.

direct_labor_hourly_rate.label: Direct Labor Hourly Rate
direct_labor_hourly_rate.helper: Average hourly wage paid to direct production workers, including base pay and shift differentials.

num_direct_labor_employees.label: Number of Direct Labor Employees
num_direct_labor_employees.placeholder: Enter number of direct labor employees
num_direct_labor_employees.helper: Total headcount of workers directly involved in production.

annual_operating_hours_per_employee.label: Annual Operating Hours per Employee
annual_operating_hours_per_employee.placeholder: Enter annual operating hours per employee
annual_operating_hours_per_employee.helper: Standard annual hours per employee (e.g., 52 weeks * 40 hours). Adjust for overtime or part-time.

total_annual_overhead_costs.label: Total Annual Overhead Costs
total_annual_overhead_costs.helper: All indirect costs: rent, utilities, management salaries, insurance, taxes, maintenance, IT, etc.

total_annual_machine_costs.label: Total Annual Machine Costs
total_annual_machine_costs.helper: Depreciation, lease payments, repairs, tooling, and energy costs for all production equipment.

average_shop_efficiency_percent.label: Average Shop Efficiency (%)
average_shop_efficiency_percent.helper: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or labor efficiency, accounting for downtime, setup, and speed loss.

quality_yield_percent.label: Quality Yield (%)
quality_yield_percent.helper: First-pass yield or overall yield; rework and scrap increase effective hourly cost.

shift_premium_factor.label: Shift Premium Factor
shift_premium_factor.helper: 1.0 for single shift, 1.1 for two-shift, 1.2 for three-shift operations (accounts for shift differentials).

include_benefits.label: Include Benefits & Payroll Taxes
include_benefits.helper: If true, adds 30% burden to direct labor rate for benefits, FICA, workers' comp, etc.

overhead_allocation_method.label: Overhead Allocation Method
overhead_allocation_method.helper: Basis for distributing overhead to hourly rate. Direct labor hours is most common in job shops.

material_cost.label: Material Cost per Unit
material_cost.helper: Direct cost of raw materials per signage unit, including substrate, ink, and laminates.

labor_hours.label: Labor Hours per Unit
labor_hours.helper: Standard direct labor hours required to produce one signage unit, based on time studies.

labor_rate.label: Labor Rate per Hour
labor_rate.helper: Fully burdened hourly wage including benefits, taxes, and overhead allocation.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Rate
overhead_rate.helper: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover facility, equipment, and administrative overhead.

complexity_factor.label: Complexity Factor
complexity_factor.helper: Adjusts labor and waste factors based on design complexity per ISO 9001 process variation guidelines.

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Defines inspection rigor and rework allowance based on Six Sigma quality levels.

quantity.label: Order Quantity
quantity.helper: Total number of signage units in the order, affecting volume discounts and setup amortization.

waste_factor.label: Waste Factor
waste_factor.helper: Expected material waste percentage due to setup, trimming, and defects, aligned with Lean manufacturing targets.

risk_margin.label: Risk Margin
risk_margin.helper: Additional margin to cover market volatility, material price fluctuations, and unforeseen delays.

shipping_cost_per_unit.label: Shipping Cost per Unit
shipping_cost_per_unit.helper: Average freight cost per unit based on distance, weight, and packaging.

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate (DPMO)
defect_rate.helper: Current defects per million opportunities for the process under evaluation.

process_sigma.label: Current Process Sigma Level
process_sigma.helper: Current sigma level of the process, typically derived from DPMO using standard conversion tables.

annual_volume.label: Annual Unit Volume
annual_volume.helper: Total number of units produced or transactions processed per year.

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost incurred per defect, including rework, scrap, warranty, and customer impact.

implementation_cost.label: Estimated Implementation Cost
implementation_cost.helper: Total cost to implement the Six Sigma improvement project (training, equipment, downtime, etc.).

project_risk.label: Project Risk Level
project_risk.helper: Qualitative assessment of risk associated with the project (technical complexity, resource availability, stakeholder buy-in).

strategic_alignment.label: Strategic Alignment Score
strategic_alignment.helper: How well the project aligns with organizational strategic goals (1 = low, 10 = high).

customer_impact.label: Customer Impact Score
customer_impact.helper: Degree of positive impact on customer satisfaction (1 = minimal, 10 = transformative).

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Confidence in the accuracy and reliability of the input data (0% = guess, 100% = verified).

wake_time.label: Desired wake-up time (24h)
wake_time.helper: Target end of sleep cycle; used to back-calculate optimal bedtimes.

sleep_debt_hours.label: Accumulated sleep debt (hours)
sleep_debt_hours.helper: Cumulative deficit from prior nights; drives recovery need per sleep science.

cycle_length_minutes.label: Average sleep cycle length
cycle_length_minutes.helper: Typical NREM/REM cycle duration; 90 min is standard, adjustable per individual.

fall_asleep_minutes.label: Estimated time to fall asleep
fall_asleep_minutes.placeholder: Enter estimated time to fall asleep
fall_asleep_minutes.helper: Sleep onset latency; affects actual sleep start time.

recovery_efficiency.label: Recovery efficiency factor
recovery_efficiency.helper: Adjusts sleep debt repayment rate (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = impaired recovery, >1.0 = enhanced).

shift_worker.label: Shift worker?
shift_worker.helper: Flag to apply circadian disruption penalty per ISO 10075-2.

current_changeover_time.label: Current Changeover Time (minutes)
current_changeover_time.helper: Total time from last good piece of previous run to first good piece of next run. Measured per SMED standard.

internal_operations_percentage.label: Internal Operations (% of total time)
internal_operations_percentage.placeholder: Enter internal operations (% of total time)
internal_operations_percentage.helper: Percentage of changeover time where machine is stopped. Target is to convert internal to external.

setup_team_size.label: Setup Team Size (operators)
setup_team_size.helper: Number of operators directly involved in the changeover process.

parallel_work_possible.label: Parallel Work Possible
parallel_work_possible.helper: Indicates if tasks can be performed simultaneously by multiple operators (SMED principle).

standardization_level.label: Standardization Level
standardization_level.helper: Degree of standardized work instructions, tooling, and die design. High = minimal adjustments.

waste_motion_score.label: Waste Motion Score (1-10)
waste_motion_score.helper: Subjective assessment of unnecessary movement, searching, and walking during changeover. 1 = optimal, 10 = extreme waste.

subgroup_size.label: Subgroup Size (n)
subgroup_size.helper: Number of samples per subgroup for X-bar and R charts. Typical values: 3-10.

num_subgroups.label: Number of Subgroups (k)
num_subgroups.helper: Total subgroups used to estimate process variation. Minimum 10 for reliable limits.

overall_mean.label: Overall Mean (X-double-bar)
overall_mean.helper: Average of subgroup means. Central line for X-bar chart.

average_range.label: Average Range (R-bar)
average_range.helper: Mean of subgroup ranges. Used to estimate process sigma.

usl.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
usl.helper: Maximum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.

lsl.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
lsl.helper: Minimum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.

chart_type.label: Chart Type
chart_type.helper: Select control chart type. Xbar-R for small subgroups, Xbar-s for larger, I-MR for individual measurements.

use_estimated_sigma.label: Use Estimated Sigma from R-bar
use_estimated_sigma.placeholder: Enter use estimated sigma from r-bar
use_estimated_sigma.helper: If true, sigma is estimated from R-bar/d2. If false, use pooled standard deviation.

process_cycle_time_min.label: Process Cycle Time (minutes)
process_cycle_time_min.helper: Average time to complete one production cycle. Used to estimate units produced per shift.

units_per_cycle.label: Units per Cycle
units_per_cycle.helper: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.

defect_rate_out_of_control.label: Defect Rate When Out of Control
defect_rate_out_of_control.placeholder: Enter defect rate when out of control
defect_rate_out_of_control.helper: Expected defect percentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).

defect_rate_in_control.label: Defect Rate When In Control
defect_rate_in_control.placeholder: Enter defect rate when in control
defect_rate_in_control.helper: Baseline defect percentage when the process is stable and in control.

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost incurred per defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).

detection_delay_hours.label: Detection Delay (hours)
detection_delay_hours.helper: Time from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).

response_delay_hours.label: Response Delay (hours)
response_delay_hours.helper: Time from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).

shift_hours.label: Shift Hours per Day
shift_hours.helper: Number of production hours per shift. Used to calculate daily production volume.

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts per Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of shifts operating per day.

operating_days_per_year.label: Operating Days per Year
operating_days_per_year.helper: Number of days the plant operates annually.

signal_frequency_per_year.label: Out-of-Control Signal Frequency (per year)
signal_frequency_per_year.helper: Expected number of out-of-control signals per year based on historical SPC data.

cost_of_correction_per_event.label: Cost of Correction per Event
cost_of_correction_per_event.placeholder: Enter cost of correction per event
cost_of_correction_per_event.helper: Average cost to investigate and correct an out-of-control event (labor, materials, downtime).

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales)
include_hidden_losses.placeholder: Enter include hidden losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales)
include_hidden_losses.helper: Toggle to include estimated hidden costs such as brand damage and lost future sales.

hidden_loss_multiplier.label: Hidden Loss Multiplier
hidden_loss_multiplier.helper: Multiplier applied to direct defect costs to estimate hidden losses (based on industry benchmarks).

area_sqft.label: Area in Square Feet
area_sqft.helper: Total area to be converted from imperial to metric units. Typical range for industrial floors, warehouses, or production cells.

measurement_accuracy.label: Measurement Accuracy Class
measurement_accuracy.helper: Defines the tolerance level of the original measurement per ISO 2768-1. Affects confidence interval and hidden loss drivers.

rounding_precision.label: Rounding Precision
rounding_precision.helper: Number of decimal places for the final result. Industrial standards often require 2-4 decimals for engineering documentation.

include_tolerance.label: Include Tolerance Band
include_tolerance.helper: If enabled, the output will include upper and lower tolerance limits based on measurement accuracy class.

orifice_diameter.label: Orifice Diameter
orifice_diameter.helper: Diameter of the trap orifice; typical failed traps have orifices from 1 mm to 20 mm.

steam_pressure.label: Steam Pressure (gauge)
steam_pressure.helper: Gauge pressure of steam upstream of the trap. Common industrial range 3–15 bar_g.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Operating Hours per Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual operating hours of the steam system. Typical continuous process: 8000 h/yr.

steam_cost.label: Steam Cost
steam_cost.helper: Cost to generate one metric tonne of steam, including fuel, water treatment, and maintenance.

trap_type.label: Trap Type
trap_type.helper: Type of steam trap influences discharge coefficient and failure mode.

failure_mode.label: Failure Mode
failure_mode.helper: Failure mode determines effective orifice area and discharge coefficient.

condensate_recovery.label: Condensate Recovery
condensate_recovery.helper: Whether condensate is recovered; affects net energy loss calculation.

actual_labor_cost.label: Actual Labor Cost
actual_labor_cost.helper: Total labor cost incurred by subcontractor.

actual_material_cost.label: Actual Material Cost
actual_material_cost.helper: Total material cost incurred by subcontractor.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead Percentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Overhead as percentage of direct costs (ISO 9001 cost accounting).

quality_rework_cost.label: Quality Rework Cost
quality_rework_cost.helper: Cost of rework due to non-conformance (Six Sigma DMAIC).

schedule_delay_penalty.label: Schedule Delay Penalty
schedule_delay_penalty.helper: Penalties incurred due to late delivery (Lean just-in-time).

waste_factor.label: Waste Factor (Lean Muda)
waste_factor.helper: Estimated waste as percentage of total direct costs (Lean manufacturing).

labor_efficiency_index.label: Labor Efficiency Index (LEI)
labor_efficiency_index.helper: Ratio of standard labor hours to actual labor hours (WERC DC metrics).

material_price_variance.label: Material Price Variance
material_price_variance.helper: Difference between standard and actual material prices.

scope_change_cost.label: Scope Change Cost
scope_change_cost.helper: Additional costs from unapproved scope changes.

inventory_holding_cost.label: Inventory Holding Cost
inventory_holding_cost.helper: Cost of carrying excess inventory (WERC warehousing).

currency_exchange_loss.label: Currency Exchange Loss
currency_exchange_loss.helper: Loss due to unfavorable exchange rate fluctuations.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of subcontractor contract influences margin risk.

use_lean_accounting.label: Use Lean Accounting Adjustments
use_lean_accounting.helper: Apply Lean accounting principles to value stream costing.

contract_value.label: Contract Value (in base currency)
contract_value.helper: Total value of the supplier contract denominated in the base currency (e.g., USD).

foreign_exposure_pct.label: Foreign Currency Exposure (%)
foreign_exposure_pct.helper: Percentage of contract value exposed to foreign currency fluctuations.

volatility_annual.label: Annual FX Volatility
volatility_annual.helper: Expected annualized standard deviation of the foreign exchange rate, based on historical data or market consensus.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
hedge_ratio.helper: Percentage of the foreign exposure that is hedged via forward contracts, options, or other instruments.

time_horizon_months.label: Time Horizon (months)
time_horizon_months.helper: Duration over which the currency risk is assessed, typically matching the contract payment schedule.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level for Value-at-Risk (VaR) calculation. Higher levels indicate more conservative risk estimates.

supplier_credit_rating.label: Supplier Credit Rating (S&P equivalent)
supplier_credit_rating.helper: Credit rating of the supplier, used to adjust default probability and overall risk premium.

use_iso_31000.label: Apply ISO 31000 Risk Management Framework
use_iso_31000.placeholder: Enter apply iso 31000 risk management framework
use_iso_31000.helper: If enabled, the calculation incorporates ISO 31000 principles for risk identification, analysis, and evaluation.

purchase_price.label: Purchase Price per Unit
purchase_price.helper: Negotiated unit price from supplier contract.

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts per million defective, Six Sigma metric.

inspection_cost_per_unit.label: Inspection Cost per Unit
inspection_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost of incoming quality inspection per unit.

freight_cost_per_unit.label: Freight Cost per Unit
freight_cost_per_unit.helper: Average shipping cost per unit from supplier.

lead_time_days.label: Lead Time (days)
lead_time_days.helper: Supplier lead time from order to delivery.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying Cost Rate
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual inventory holding cost as percentage of unit cost (Lean metric).

warranty_claim_rate.label: Warranty Claim Rate
warranty_claim_rate.helper: Percentage of units that result in warranty claims.

average_claim_cost.label: Average Warranty Claim Cost
average_claim_cost.helper: Average cost per warranty claim (labor, parts, logistics).

supplier_quality_level.label: Supplier Quality Level
supplier_quality_level.helper: Qualitative assessment of supplier quality management system (ISO 9001).

use_eco_cost.label: Include Environmental Cost
use_eco_cost.helper: Toggle to include estimated carbon and waste disposal costs (ISO 14040).

co2_per_unit.label: CO2 Emissions per Unit
co2_per_unit.helper: Estimated carbon footprint per unit from supplier operations.

carbon_tax_rate.label: Carbon Tax Rate
carbon_tax_rate.helper: Applicable carbon tax or internal carbon price.

supplier_reliability_score.label: Supplier Reliability Score (0-100)
supplier_reliability_score.helper: Historical on-time delivery and quality performance of key suppliers. Higher score indicates better reliability.

inventory_buffer_days.label: Inventory Buffer (Days of Cover)
inventory_buffer_days.helper: Average days of inventory held to absorb demand or supply shocks. Based on lean inventory principles.

lead_time_variability.label: Lead Time Variability (Coefficient of Variation)
lead_time_variability.placeholder: Enter lead time variability (coefficient of variation)
lead_time_variability.helper: Standard deviation of lead time divided by mean lead time. Higher values indicate unpredictable supply.

single_source_dependency.label: Single Source Dependency (0-100%)
single_source_dependency.helper: Percentage of critical components sourced from a single supplier. High dependency increases risk.

geopolitical_risk_index.label: Geopolitical Risk Index (0-100)
geopolitical_risk_index.helper: Composite index of political instability, trade restrictions, and regional conflicts affecting supply chain.

demand_volatility.label: Demand Volatility (Coefficient of Variation)
demand_volatility.helper: Variability in customer demand over time. High volatility strains capacity and inventory.

transportation_disruption_probability.label: Transportation Disruption Probability (0-1)
transportation_disruption_probability.helper: Estimated likelihood of a major transportation disruption (port closure, strike, etc.) in the next quarter.

quality_defect_rate.label: Quality Defect Rate (ppm)
quality_defect_rate.helper: Parts per million defective from incoming inspection. Six Sigma target is < 3.4 ppm.

cyber_risk_score.label: Cyber Risk Score (0-100)
cyber_risk_score.helper: Assessment of cybersecurity vulnerabilities in supply chain IT systems. Higher score indicates higher risk.

use_advanced_hedging.label: Enable Advanced Hedging Strategies
use_advanced_hedging.helper: If true, applies financial and operational hedging models to mitigate currency and commodity risks.

target_value.label: Target Value (T)
target_value.helper: The ideal nominal specification for the product characteristic (e.g., length, weight, voltage).

lower_spec_limit.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
lower_spec_limit.helper: Minimum acceptable value per engineering or customer requirement.

upper_spec_limit.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
